faqs.question: Which Medical fields offer the best work-life balance?
faqs.answer:
Some medical field which offe best work and life balance are shown below -
Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.
Pharmacy (BPharm & MPharm) – Less stress compared to hospital-based jobs.
Physiotherapy (BPT & MPT) – Flexible working hours, minimal emergency calls.
Public Health & Community Medicine – Focus on preventive healthcare rather than emergency treatments.
Clinical Research & Medical Writing – Research-based work with no direct patient responsibilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I think I chose the best college.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students got placed from my course. The highest package is more than 1.5 lacs per month. The lowest salary is about Rs. 50,000- Rs. 60,000 per annum. The average package is about 1 LPA. Recruitment at AIIMS. Almost all my batchmates got an internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is spread over 5 acres of land and has individual departments. Wi-Fi is available all around the college. It has a big playground. Food is available in a mess. The quality of food is good.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are like our parents, they are very helpful and sweet. They are very knowledgeable, and the teaching quality is fantastic. It is relevant for our day-to-day life. Semester exams are quite tough and require reading 12 hours daily to score good marks. Faculty members are from every corner of the state of Assam.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for dentistry among the government institutes in the country.

review_content.Placements: Students get placed in government posts, and some go to pursue their masters. Some do the junior residence in the college itself and the rest open up their own dental clinic. Some students also got placed in private companies and appeared to leave the clinic aspect and go for some non-clinical roles in the industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: The new building of the college has all modern facilities but the old building is a bit of an old type with a need for renovation. All departments have dedicated labs and clinics with separate UG and PG clinics. It has state-of-the-art operation theatre along with an auditorium, library, and playground. It has both boys and girls hostel separately.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Regional Dental College has good infrastructure, highly educated facilities, and good placements.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary package offered is above 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is above 1 LPA. Students from our course got placed in top recruiting companies and hospitals. Every student got a scholarship from our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has great infrastructure. There are 9 different departments. Our college has classrooms, a library, a sports room, and a playground. Our college has a separate boys and girls hostel with high maintenance. The mess, medical facilities, and canteens are available in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, but it does not have devoted faculty members.

review_content.Placements: As a state dental college, RDC has 50 students in each batch and students come from the entire northeast and even from all of India. The course duration is 4 years and one year for an internship, so it sums up to 5 years. The internship period is quite good, and the stipend is also lucrative than most other colleges. After getting the degree, you can opt for private service or government service.
review_content.Infrastructure: Being a dental college, it has nine departments, and each department has 4-5 faculty members on average. Our departments are equipped with required dental chairs, both diagnostic and surgical instruments, sterilizing equipment and all the necessary utilities.

college_info.college_name: Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University was founded in 2009. It is a public university and is located in Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh. Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute offers courses in Full Time mode. Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University offers a total of 18 courses in stream such as Science. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are M.Sc., UG Diploma, B.F.Sc., BVSC and MVSC and the total seat intake for the available courses is 224. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Fisheries Science and Veterinary Science. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,00,898 to 2,38,909 and the average median salary is around INR 2,62,000. Apart from this, the Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are M.Sc., UG Diploma, B.F.Sc., BVSC and MVSC and the total seat intake for the available courses is 224. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Fisheries Science and Veterinary Science. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,00,898 to 2,38,909 and the average median salary is around INR 2,62,000. Apart from this, the Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Fisheries Science (B.F.Sc.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Average experience but if you're interested in fishes you can join.

review_content.Placements: The students here are pretty united. Teachers are supportive and always there for you no matter what. Many fieldworks are done. Many matsya samiti are connected, so the placement is also good. One can pursue a career in feed companies, etc., or can do research here on many fish varieties.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on campus as well as in the hostel. Departments are pretty good, and they coordinated well with each other. The mess of the hotel is also good, and the canteen is opened recently. Each year intercollegiate sports competitions and cultural events are also organized.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.V.Sc. and A.H. - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college has good facilities.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students are placed in BVSC and AH. The highest package is 8 LPA, and the minimum is 5 LPA. The top recruiters are ABC & MVU. The internship was good in my college, and the government hospital was interning us. The top role is government VAS (veterinary assistant surgeon).
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs were good, and wi-fi is not available for students. Classes were okay—not perfect, but okay. The hostel has excellent food and hygiene, as well as good hostel management. A fully furnished sports room and field are also available on college campus and all is well in my college .

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Science and Animal Husbandry (B. V. Sc. & A.H.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Nanaji Deshmukh Veterinary Science University.

review_content.Placements: Our college does not provide placements. It provides paid internships every month in the clinical industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has many departments. It has five huge smart classrooms. We have many laboratories. Our college has a library for students. We have a good canteen. The hostel rooms are good and spacious. Playgrounds are available for sports.
review_content.Faculty: All faculty members are good and well-educated. They are experienced and knowledgeable. They teach us very well. Each subject has 3-4 teachers. Internal exams are difficult to pass. The pass criterion is 7 CGPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.V.Sc. and A.H. - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for BVSC AH courses in Madhya Pradesh.

review_content.Placements: Almost 70% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered is Rs. 80,000 per month. The average salary offered is Rs. 40,000 per month. Almost 70% of students got internships. Top roles offered are veterinary assistant surgeon, veterinary officer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college has Wi-Fi, a library, a hostel, a canteen, etc. Classrooms are well-furnished. The food served in the mess is average. They provide medical and sports facilities. They conduct many games.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This course is good for those who want the knowledge about animals.

review_content.Placements: The best experience in animal husbandry can be obtained in this college. From this course, one gets a government service with a recruitment test which can be applied after completing the course. There are campus selections also in college from all over India for animal concerning fields.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, all needed facilities were available for gaining knowledge such as practicals farm visits, anatomical study, etc. Hostel facilities were also available. The cultural fest was amazing for fun and representing your talent. The library was available with several books of knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.V.Sc. and A.H. - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college, with good teachers and good view.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students got placed in B.V.Sc and A.H course. The highest paid course is MVSC, and the lowest paid course is animal husbandry. Students got recruited in government hospitals, and every student got an internship in the veterinary course in rural hospitals. This is the best college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has almost all facilities like laboratories, libraries, and classrooms. Wi-Fi is not available for students in college. Good facilities are available in college as well as in hostel. The mess offers good food, and the canteen is far from the college. The sports ground is available, and games facilities are also available.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Agartala Government Medical College:

faqs.answer: A:    Agartala Government Medical College has been rated 4.3 on placements.
faqs.question: Does Agartala Government Medical College provide good placement facilities?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Agartala Government Medical College offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG stage, courses available include MBBS. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like MD and MS. Agartala Government Medical College fee structure ranges between INR 3,37,950 to 4,50,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The overall seats available across all courses offered by Agartala Government Medical College is up to 204. Good thing to know is that Agartala Government Medical College has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like NMC.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Agartala Government Medical College for all courses combined?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Poor infrastructure in sports but good in academic with good faculty and good placements overall.

review_content.Placements: Placement is overall good. Here there is lot to learn and experience during internship which is not available in other northeastern medical college. In our batch there were 125 students out of which after intern around 30 were working in reputed hospitals in Delhi.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in hostel however in library its available for all. Classrooms are upto the mark. Quality of food serve in mess is below average the variety present is not okay. There is also problem in electricity in hostel sometimes and even scarcity of drinking water during summer.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Agartala Government Medical College.

review_content.Placements: About 85% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Most of the students get government jobs. Other than that, private or corporate hospitals also recruit students. A maximum of them are joined as junior residents, while some are joined as PGs.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has five lecture halls and one library. The lecture halls are fully equipped for digital classes. Wi-Fi facilities are available. Labs are available for every department. It has a total of 19 departments. The library is fully equipped with national and foreign journals. Hostels for boys and girls are separate.

overview_faqs.question: Is Agartala Government Medical College a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Agartala Government Medical College is a well-known institution for MBBS, MD, MS courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Agartala Government Medical College has a rating of 4.2 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 4.3 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Agartala Government Medical College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: It is not luxurious, but it provides strong learning for serious MBBS students.

content.Placements: There is no placement system, as it is an MBBS course. After completion, we go for internships, postgraduate studies, or government/private hospital jobs. There are many departments where we can pursue PG and build our future. During internship, everyone is paid around Rs. 20,000 to Rs.22,000.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is decent for a government medical college. Lecture halls are good, with LH 4 being the biggest, used for first-year students. Labs are functional. The hospital has a good patient load, which helps us learn a lot and improves clinical learning. Hostel facilities are not very good but are manageable. We do not have an indoor badminton court, but there is outdoor space and a volleyball court.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Why you should take admission in Agartala government. Medical College .

content.Placements: Basically, there are 125 students in each batch. The cutoff for the year was as follows: Your/OBC - 534 SC - 474 ST - 362 EWS - 470 Fees are around 65k per year (15k per year for hostel and 2k per month for mess). Around 80% of students get internships per year. Except for these, many scholarships are available for all categories of students.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi is available in the library. Labs of all the subjects are available separately in a good manner. Classrooms of all the batches have a smart class system along with adequate seats, AC, and all other facilities. The quality of food in the mess can be rated as 4/5. Food includes veg as well as non-veg. Medical facilities are easily available free of cost. Sports are regularly held in the college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Poor infrastructure in sports but good in academic with good faculty and good placements overall.

content.Placements: Placement is overall good. Here there is lot to learn and experience during internship which is not available in other northeastern medical college. In our batch there were 125 students out of which after intern around 30 were working in reputed hospitals in Delhi.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available in hostel however in library its available for all. Classrooms are upto the mark. Quality of food serve in mess is below average the variety present is not okay. There is also problem in electricity in hostel sometimes and even scarcity of drinking water during summer.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Agartala Government Medical College.

content.Placements: About 85% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest is 6 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA. Most of the students get government jobs. Other than that, private or corporate hospitals also recruit students. A maximum of them are joined as junior residents, while some are joined as PGs.
content.Infrastructure: It has five lecture halls and one library. The lecture halls are fully equipped for digital classes. Wi-Fi facilities are available. Labs are available for every department. It has a total of 19 departments. The library is fully equipped with national and foreign journals. Hostels for boys and girls are separate.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Everything is satisfactory. Time period is long but it's worth it.

content.Placements: Doctors from agmc goes to many respectful places and receive high salary like 80000 to 120009. Believe me it's worth spending your 5.5 years in agmc I never felt regret taking agmc and MBBS both. You will never feel when your MBBS is passed. After MBBS you may choose your field of interest.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is only available in library. Labs and classrooms are well maintained. Hostel is quiet good you have your own room and well ventilated, good lighting,24 hour electricity and have a common roon, a study room and a tv on 3rd floor. Mess food is also good and you have to pay 3000 per month for that. Canteen is also there. Medical facilities are also good as it's a medical college and have a playground for sports and games.

While the admissions are based on the scores/rank obtained in NEET exam, the last cut offs also change a lot depending on All India quota or Home State.

faqs.question: What has been the trend for cut off in MBBS at Agartala Government Medical College in last few years?
faqs.answer: The cutoff trend for medical Courses at Agartala Government Medical College has been increasing in the recent years. Likewise, the cut off ranks have changed from 11159 to 21895 for OBC,  62064 to 114760 for SC,  89740 to 125167 for ST,  11240 to 22992 for EWS,  442454 to 22347 for PWD. This trend is likely to continue in the coming years, as the demand for medical

Cut off are different when it comes to other categories or female candidates and even domicile of home state. description: Agartala Government Medical College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for various accepting exams. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff details across different rounds and categories. Other important updates are as follows:

Agartala Government Medical College NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the MBBS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 27001 for MBBS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Agartala Government Medical College MBBS cutoff 2025 was 27001 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 25825 for admission to the MBBS course. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

The cutoff was released in the form of opening and closing ranks for multiple categories under the All India quota. For round 4, the closing cutoff for the General AI category ranged from 18099 to 150671. According to this range, the most competitive course is MD. For more details, see the table below.

According to the Agartala Government Medical College MD cutoff 2025, the most sought-after specialisations for the General AI category were MD in Pulmonary Medicine, followed by MD in Microbiology and MD in Bio-Chemistry. The round 4 closing ranks for these specialisations were 18099, 135879 and 137853, respectively.
For the students belonging to the OBC category, the NEET PG Round 4 closing was 159068.
Students who appeared for the NEET PG exam 2025 can refer to the table below to view the NEET PG Round 1 cutoff list. They can also download the results for later use.

Agartala Government Medical College Cutoff 2024 has been released for its first round on the basis of candidates' performance in the Tripura NEET UG exam. The Round 1 cutoff for admission to the MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery was 1115400 for the General HS quota. Our college provides separate hostels for boys, girls and nurses, and Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostels...

reviews.review_heading: A budding medical college in Tripura .

There is a well air conditioned library having all the latest textbooks, journals both national and foreign. Also there are 40 computers with broadband connection enabled for the convenience of the students and teachers. Wi-Fi facility is available in the college campus. There are separate hostels for UG boys, girls, PGTs and residents of our college and hospital. All essential items are availab...

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with our college faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are 5 huge lecture halls in our college, which are dedicated to 9 semesters of the course curriculum. There is also a library which has recent and old collections of textbooks and Indian and foreign journals. The library has 20 computers with broadband connections for internet facilities for students and other faculty members. Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. There are separate hostels for boys, girls, interns and PGTs, and all essential services are available in the hostel. The ...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and its infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: BSNL Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. The labs are okay, and the library is good. Indoor and outdoor games are available, and there is also a gym on the campus. The condition of the hostel is decent, but there is water crisis sometimes, and the quality of food is also not that good. There is no ragging on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Agartala Government Medical College is a budding medical college of northeast India.
reviews.review_text: Our college has five spacious lecture halls. The library is well stocked with updated textbooks, along with Indian and international journals. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus and the library also provides 25 computers with broadband internet access for students and faculty. Separate hostels are available for boys, girls, interns and PGTs, all with essential facilities. The mess food is quite good and there are two canteens for doctors and one canteen for patients. The campus also has ex...

reviews.review_heading: Good teachers with high knowledge.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are big and spacious with well-working projectors and ACs and labs are neat and clean but hostel food is not satisfactory. Sometimes there is a water problem and an electricity problem. The library is big and has lots of books for MBBS. Overall, the college is satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied but there is also many scopes of improvements but hope soon it will be improved
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but still a lot of scope of improvements are there . Mess food is good ,but for vegeterians i feel personally food is not that good as compared to non vegeterians and options are also limited . Medical facilities are very good . Sports and games facilities needs improvement . Library is good.

reviews.review_heading: Academic exposure for UG level is good with average hostels, but there is no proper campus life.
reviews.review_text: Hostel campus is not up to the mark. The boys' hostel has many shortcomings while the girls' hostel is quite well-maintained. Sometimes water scarcity occurs, but these are acute. They also offer PG family and individual hostel facilities, but there is no campus life. The campus lacks a cafeteria or other places to hangout. So you have to go to the city for hanging out.

faqs.answer: A:    Punjab Institute of Medical Sciences courses are approved by eminent Government bodies such as NMC. The combined seats available for various programmes provided by Punjab Institute of Medical Sciences goes up to 150.
faqs.question: How many seats are available at Punjab Institute of Medical Sciences for all courses combined?

review_content.General: Around 120 students got placed in our college. Top roles offered are MD and MS. Students got placed as medical officers in government and civil hospitals. Some students passed foreign exams and got placed in good foreign hospitals. Medical companies visit our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities like well-equipped labs, 24X7 Wi-Fi, an air-conditioned lecture theatre, an air-conditioned library, etc. It provides facilities for sports like badminton, cricket, table tennis, football, volleyball, chess, etc. Students can always use the library.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Punjab Institute of Medical Sciences.

review_content.Placements: Many clinician students got placed in this course. Internships are also offered in our course. No companies visit our college for recruitment. This course will make us ready to apply for jobs. We can also easily practice to make our hands smooth.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very good. The food served in the hostel is not good. You will get bored of hostel food and miss home food. The infrastructure is better compared to other government medical colleges. Our campus life is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure. But the management of the college is corrupt.

review_content.Placements: College offers MBBS course. Admission is based on the merit list on the basis of marks scored in NEET exam. There are 150 seats in a batch. 75 are government and 75 are management. Government costs 20L and management costs up to 50L. Course is of 5.5 years which includes 1 year internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has canteens on every floor. The main canteen provides all the food for hostel and patient. Quality served is good in canteen. College has a Library, a badminton court, basketball court and a ground. The infrastructure of the college building is new. Looks like PGI. The classrooms are like auditoriums and are installed with projectors and are Air-conditioned.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and facilities are provided. Hostels are well furnished.

content.Placements: My batch is the 2020 batch, and we will pass out in 2025. It is a 5.5-year course, and each batch has 150 students. After the MBBS internship, the NEET PG exam is conducted for MD. Every year, some students pass the exam and achieve really good ranks, as it is a very tough exam. 100% of students do internships in the same college.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well maintained, and central AC facilities are available. The library also has AC and free Wi-Fi, and it is well spaced. Hostels are well furnished and maintained, with AC facilities, and good quality food is provided. Sports and games facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Punjab Institute of Medical Science, Jalandhar .

content.Placements: My college does not provide placements; however, it gives us the opportunity to do an internship for 1 year after the completion of a 4.5-year-long course. Here at the Punjab Institute of Medical Sciences, Jalandhar, after the completion of the course, you have to complete 1 year of necessary internships, which will provide you with a stipend of around Rs 10,000. However, the college does not promise you any placements.
content.Infrastructure: I have opted for a hostel facility in PIMS, Jalandhar. It also has two steel almirahs. And of course, to beat the scorching heat, students are provided with air conditioning, both split and windows; however, there are also rooms available without AC. Talking about the food in PIMS hostels, it is quite good considering that it is hostel food.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 120 students got placed in our college. Top roles offered are MD and MS. Students got placed as medical officers in government and civil hospitals. Some students passed foreign exams and got placed in good foreign hospitals. Medical companies visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all facilities like well-equipped labs, 24X7 Wi-Fi, an air-conditioned lecture theatre, an air-conditioned library, etc. It provides facilities for sports like badminton, cricket, table tennis, football, volleyball, chess, etc. Students can always use the library.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Punjab Institute of Medical Sciences.

content.Placements: Many clinician students got placed in this course. Internships are also offered in our course. No companies visit our college for recruitment. This course will make us ready to apply for jobs. We can also easily practice to make our hands smooth.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are very good. The food served in the hostel is not good. You will get bored of hostel food and miss home food. The infrastructure is better compared to other government medical colleges. Our campus life is good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure. But the management of the college is corrupt.

content.Placements: College offers MBBS course. Admission is based on the merit list on the basis of marks scored in NEET exam. There are 150 seats in a batch. 75 are government and 75 are management. Government costs 20L and management costs up to 50L. Course is of 5.5 years which includes 1 year internship.
content.Infrastructure: College has canteens on every floor. The main canteen provides all the food for hostel and patient. Quality served is good in canteen. College has a Library, a badminton court, basketball court and a ground. The infrastructure of the college building is new. Looks like PGI. The classrooms are like auditoriums and are installed with projectors and are Air-conditioned.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Calcutta National Medical College, Kolkata.

review_content.Placements: 100% of the students have to do the internship after 4 years of academics. With a 30000 per month stipend, after that, you can apply for a house staffship and get up to 1 lac per month. You will be playing the role of a medical officer in the hospital.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has very well-established labs and classrooms fully equipped with AC. And the canteen is very nice and very affordable. The hostel is also very affordable, at 12 rupees per month, with meals costing 50 rupees per meal and three meals per day. Rooms are very clean and spacious.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Perks of Studying at Calcutta National Medical College .

review_content.Placements: I'm still a first-year student, so I wouldn't be the best one to comment on the placement situation at our college on a first-hand basis. I've heard of instances from my seniors, and CNMC&H is undoubtedly one of the finest medical colleges to choose from in West Bengal.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lecture halls are extremely spacious, with a sloping seating arrangement that makes it easier for students to have a clear vision of the board. The classrooms are clean and well-ventilated. We have a few libraries within the college campus itself, with every possible book at our disposal. I haven't taken a hostel yet, so I won't be able to comment on the hostel facilities.

overview_faqs.question: Can Calcutta National Medical College, Kolkata be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Calcutta National Medical College, Kolkata is a reputed institute for MBBS, DM, M.Ch., PG Diploma, B.Sc. (Post Basic), MD, MS, B.Sc., UG Diploma. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Calcutta National Medical College, Kolkata has a review rating of 4.5 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.3 on campuslife, 4.7 on placements, 4.3 on faculty and 4.2 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Calcutta National Medical College, Kolkata Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Best college to study medicine. Lots of patient interactions. Best college fests.

content.Placements: Basically, there are 2 types of UG courses offered in this college: MBBS and B.Sc. Nursing. And PG courses for MD and MS and super specialty courses like DM and MCH. In case you're an MBBS doctor, your 1-year service can be secured in the college after completion of your degree if you're among the top 100 among 250 students. After that there are lots and lots of private nursing homes offering a handsome salary to take you as RMO.
content.Infrastructure: There are 2 separate building areas, one for academics and another for patients. The academic building is well oriented, clean and all. But the hospital building is a little chaotic and problematic. The hospitals in all areas are away from each other so they seem to be a small campus but it is quite big. For girls, there is an adequate amount of hostel without any fees. But for boys, there are limited seats so it depends on the family income and distance of the student's residence from college.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is good for MBBS course - CNMC.

content.Placements: Hello, I am an M.A. 2nd year MBBS student at Calcutta National Medical College. Here is some information about my college, the fee structure is average in my opinion. For each, we have to pay Rs 4,500 including hostel and tuition fees. The caution fee is Rs 1,000. We have to pay Rs 1,000 the first time during admission. Hostel atmosphere can be rated as 6 out of 10. Overall average.
content.Infrastructure: There are very good air-conditioned classrooms, lecture halls, auditorium, and reading rooms. We have a library which is suitable for good study. There are 2 parks inside this college where students can do recreational activities. There is a lack of good hygienic washrooms and drinking water. This college has no playground of our own. Hostel atmosphere is good. It can be rated as 7 out of 10 in my opinion. Canteen food is average. Medical facilities are very good and it is very much helpful.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Calcutta National Medical College, Kolkata.

content.Placements: 100% of the students have to do the internship after 4 years of academics. With a 30000 per month stipend, after that, you can apply for a house staffship and get up to 1 lac per month. You will be playing the role of a medical officer in the hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has very well-established labs and classrooms fully equipped with AC. And the canteen is very nice and very affordable. The hostel is also very affordable, at 12 rupees per month, with meals costing 50 rupees per meal and three meals per day. Rooms are very clean and spacious.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Perks of Studying at Calcutta National Medical College .

content.Placements: I'm still a first-year student, so I wouldn't be the best one to comment on the placement situation at our college on a first-hand basis. I've heard of instances from my seniors, and CNMC&H is undoubtedly one of the finest medical colleges to choose from in West Bengal.
content.Infrastructure: The lecture halls are extremely spacious, with a sloping seating arrangement that makes it easier for students to have a clear vision of the board. The classrooms are clean and well-ventilated. We have a few libraries within the college campus itself, with every possible book at our disposal. I haven't taken a hostel yet, so I won't be able to comment on the hostel facilities.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely very good college for infrastructure, academics events, fest and patient load etc.

content.Placements: Most of the students get selected for Housestaffship and rest apply for General duty reserve medical officer and prepare for post graduation. Everyone got internship in our college. During internship they got 29000 stiped and housestaffship is 45000.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very well, the academic is awesome. Almost every department is present in our college. And the hostel facility is also well, 2 students per room with good room condition and separate boys and girl hostel. There is a good facility of water.

reviews.review_heading: Best college to study medicine. Lots of patient interactions. Best college fests.
reviews.review_text:
There are 2 separate building areas, one for academics and another for patients. The academic building is well oriented, clean and all. But the hospital building is a little chaotic and problematic. The hospitals in all areas are away from each other so they seem to be a small campus but it is quite big. For girls, there is an adequate amount of hostel without any fees. 
But for boys, there are limited seats so it depends on the family income and distance of the student's residence from college.

reviews.review_heading: It is good for MBBS course - CNMC.
reviews.review_text: There are very good air-conditioned classrooms, lecture halls, auditorium, and reading rooms. We have a library which is suitable for good study. There are 2 parks inside this college where students can do recreational activities. There is a lack of good hygienic washrooms and drinking water. This college has no playground of our own. Hostel atmosphere is good. It can be rated as 7 out of 10 in my opinion. Canteen food is average. Medical facilities are very good and it is very much helpful.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Calcutta National Medical College, Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Our college has very well-established labs and classrooms fully equipped with AC. And the canteen is very nice and very affordable. The hostel is also very affordable, at 12 rupees per month, with meals costing 50 rupees per meal and three meals per day. Rooms are very clean and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Perks of Studying at Calcutta National Medical College .
reviews.review_text: The lecture halls are extremely spacious, with a sloping seating arrangement that makes it easier for students to have a clear vision of the board. The classrooms are clean and well-ventilated. We have a few libraries within the college campus itself, with every possible book at our disposal. I haven't taken a hostel yet, so I won't be able to comment on the hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely very good college for infrastructure, academics events, fest and patient load etc.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure of the college is very well, the academic is awesome. Almost every department is present in our college.
And the hostel facility is also well, 2 students per room with good room condition and separate boys and girl hostel. There is a good facility of water.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college. Laboratory is moderately maintained. Classrooms and library are excellent. There are two boys' hostels and we have to walk 10-15 minutes to the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: It gives the best college life.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 4 to 5 lecture theaters and a library facility is available in our college. There are reading rooms, labs, 2 boys' hostels, and 3 girls' hostels. The quality of food served in the mess is good. Our college has 2 grounds.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has 19 departments and is well-equipped with ample amenities to cater to the needs of every MBBS student. The lecture theatres are well-furnished and air-conditioned. The library has a stock of about 19,000 books with national and international medical journals. Our college has a reading room adjacent to the library is fully air-conditioned and provides an ideal ambiance to study. There is a spacious canteen, which provides delicious food at fair prices. There is a common room for st...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Calcutta National Medical College, Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure were good. The classroom provides air-conditioned, and the library was well-decorated. The hostel facilities were good, and the laboratories were good with a proper supply of materials. Wi-Fi was not available in this college. Our college has a good quality reasonable hostel for students ladies and gents separately. Every hostel provides a canteen facility, and food was affordable. It also provides a separate game room.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college to pursue MBBS . Good infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: There is lift at every floor of the building. There is a library and two reading rooms for the students. Wi- Fi is not provided. Hostel and the facilities like drinking water and healthy food are also available. There are two grounds on the campus for sports. The size of the classrooms are okay and they have air conditioners also.

reviews.review_heading: Renowned college from British era.
reviews.review_text: Library and reading rooms are nice and lecture halls are properly maintained with AC in it. There are 3 hostels for girls and 2 hostels for boys, one of the girls hostel has attached bathrooms in it and quality of food is good with non veg provision.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities are very good and well behaved .
reviews.review_text:
In our college has bigger central library and each and every department have different lecture theatre, laboratory and free Wi-Fi facility
Our college has a good quality reasonable hostel for students ladies and gents separately, Every hostel has own canteen and give affordable food and has separate games room.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good, and its campus is good. Infrastructural facilities are also very nice.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are good here. All types of food items are available here, and there is a canteen here. Medical facilities are almost available, and there is a playground. Different types of cultural programmes are also conducted here. There is a nice relationship between seniors and juniors. The environment is peaceful here.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good government medical college.
reviews.review_text: Good facility, good infrastructure AC facility classroom, well decorated library hostel facilities are best with mess food excellent, labs are good with proper supply of materials, lab assistant are well corporation, excellent teacher, and no Wi-Fi facility available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Calcutta National Medical College, Kolkata.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are well organised and decorated here completely with tiles. 2 sharing rooms are available, and the quality of food served is average. Gyms and sports are available here, and there is also a library. A beautiful garden is available in every hostel ground. There are 5 hostels. They are Linton boys' hostel, main boys' hostel, new ladies hostel, old ladies hostel and a Pavlop hostel.

The institute offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme under the guidance of experts. The institute offers BTech specialisation in Civil, Chemical, Mechanical, Automobile, Mechatronics, Information Technology, and others.

reviews_list.review_title: Needs major improvement in faculty and practical learning. Provides average placements.

review_content.Placements: I am a B.Tech Information Technology student from the 2027 batch at Uka Tarsadia University. Placements are average, with around 60% of students placed. Highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, lowest salary package offered is around 2.5 LPA, and average salary offered is around 3.5 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, and Tatvasoft. About 50% of students received internships, mostly in small IT firms or startups. Roles offered were mainly software developer, QA tester, and support engineer. Placement support is decent but could improve. Many students rely on off-campus drives for better opportunities, especially in specialized domains like cybersecurity or data Science.

review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. The quality of the food is great. The hostel has a separate canteen and living rooms for both girls and boys. course_faqs.question: How student keep getting Uka Tarsadia BBA scholarship every year?
course_faqs.answer: If student wants keep getting scholarship for next year they need pass all the exams in first division. Also they are not supposed to take any study gap. If they fail to adhere to rules, they will not get any scholarship. Make sure that you maintain a good score throughout the programme.

It is better to talk to the faculty for any doubts in curriculum. Try to attend the classes from the beginning of the session without fail.

course_faqs.answer: Yes, Uka Tarsadia gives many scholarships which also includes BBA students. Main one is Shri B.U. Patel Scholarship for UG and PG students who are from weak background. Family income must be less than INR 2 Lacs per year and students must pass in first division to get it.

admission_overview.college_name: UKA Tarsadia University Course Admissions 2025: Eligibility, Fees, Selection & Last Dates

paragraphs: UKA Tarsadia University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. The university considers national or state-level entrance exams such as CAT, MAT, GUJCET, etc. for admission to specific courses.UKA Tarsadia Universityoffers courses at UG, PG, diploma and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Arts, Science, etc. The university offers courses at the campus and through affiliated colleges. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred programme.

The university offers admission to UG and PG courses based on merit or national or state-level entrance exam scores. Candidates can fill out the application form online for the preferred programme. Find below the key highlights forUTU admissions:
Particulars
UTU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
How to apply?
https://utu.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

UTU admissionsare conducted once a year for all courses. Aspirants seeking admission in the university have to fulfil both eligibility and selection requirements to apply for admission. The basic eligibility is Class 12 for UG and graduation for PG programmes. Below are popularUKA Tarsadia University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
MAT/CAT/CMAT/ any other relevant entrance test + ACPC
GUJCET/JEE Main* + ACPC (As per the policy decided by ACPC)
Graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC)
Candidates should have passed HSc and bachelor's degree with Mathematics or Business Mathematics or Statistics as one of the subjects
*In the absence of information, selection criteria is taken from an unofficial source. Hence, data might vary.

UTU admissionsare currently open. The university opens admission online with the registration process. Candidates must check the course-specific selection requirements before applying for a programme. Aspirants can check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
Step 1: UTU Application Process 2025

Candidates fulfilling the eligibility requirements can apply online for UTU admission. Candidates need to pay an application fee to register for a course. Aspirants need to fill out the form and upload the specified documents to complete the application process.
Step 2: Selection

The university considers entrance exams such as CAT, CMAT, MAT, GUJCET, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. The selection to most of the programmes is based on the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation

The university informs the candidates about their admission after completion of the selection process. Candidates seeking admission in MBA, or MCA have to participate in ACPC Counselling. Selected candidates need to come for document verification and pay theUTU feeto confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about Uka Tarsadia University Admission Process check out the below video:

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to B.Tech at Uka Tarsadia University?

Aspirants must also pass GUJCET or JEE Main for admission to BTech programme. Besides, aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What is the pattern of GUJCET 2025 question paper?
faqs.answer: GUJCET 2025 paper will be three hours long and total 120 questions will be there. Out of these,  40 questions each come from Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics. Students need to focus equally on all three subjects to score good marks.

The selection to the MBA course is based on CAT, MAT or CMAT scores followed by ACPC Counselling. Aspirants who have passed graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) are eligible to apply for an MBA. There are a total of 180 seats in the MBA programme.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at UKA Tarsadia University cost?

On paying the tuition fee of INR 1.4 lakh, students can expect an average package of INR 2.4 lakh. Aspirants need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I get admission to UKA Tarsadia University for MBA with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate to apply for UKA Tarsadia MBA programme. Hence, aspirants must complete their graduation after Class 12 for admission to MBA. Graduation is compulsory to apply for the MBA course. Besides, aspirants must also pass CAT, CMAT or MAT for admission. There is a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for reserved category candidates making it easier for them.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MBA at Uka Tarsadia University?
faqs.answer: UKA Tarsadia University admission to MBA course is based on entrance exam scores. The university considers CAT, MAT or CMAT scores for admission to MBA. Selected candidates have to further participate in ACPC Counselling. Selected candidates are offered seat in MBA programme based on their rank in the entrance exam.

courses_data.name: Uka Tarsadia University MCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Uka Tarsadia University offers a two-year full-time MCA programme spread across four semesters. Candidates who have passed graduation with at least 50% aggregate are eligible to apply for MCA. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC category candidates. One must also have appeared for CMAT for admission to MCA. A total of 180 seats are available in MCA programme of UTU.

faqs.question: Can I apply for MCA at UKA Tarsadia University without CMAT?
faqs.answer: No, candidates need to have a valid score in CMAT for admission to UKA Tarsadia University MCA programme. Selected candidates are further required to participate in ACPC Counselling for admission. Besides CMAT, aspirants also need to complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC) for admission to MCA progamme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MCA at Uka Tarsadia University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pass graduation with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC) to apply for UKA Tarsadia University MCA programme. Aspirants must also pass Class 12 or HSC examination nad bachelor's degree with Mathematics or Business Mathematics or Statistics as one of the subjects to apply for MCA.

faqs.question: Is MCA offered at Uka Tarsadia University?
faqs.answer: Yes, UKA Tarsadia University a two-year full-time MCA programme divided into four semesters. Aspirants must complete graduation with at least 50% aggregate to apply for MCA. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC category candidates. The selection for MCA is based on CMAT score.

faqs.question: How can candidates join Uka Tarsadia University?
faqs.answer: Hi.Admission to most of the programs in Uska Tarsadia University is conducted as per the norms set by the Admission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC).However, admission in the B.Arch is done on the basis of NATA entrance, BPT through ACPMEC, MBA through CMAT and the M.Pharm through GPAT.For the B.Arch candidates must qualify the NATA entrance exam and meet ACPC eligibility.For the BPT program, a valid ACPMEC score is applicable.For the MBA admissions are done through CMAT.For the M.Pharm

faqs.question: Are admissions at UKA Tarsadia University entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: UKA Tarsadia University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. Admission to majority of the programmes such as BBA, BCA, BCom, etc. is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. The selection for MBA is based on CAT, MAT or CMAT scores. The university considers CMAT and GUJCET/ JEE Main for MCA and BTech programmes, respectively.

faqs.question: Can students join UKA Tarsadia University directly without any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, UKA Tarsadia University offers admission to most of the programmes based on merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. The university considers entrance exam for admission to courses such as BTech, MBA, MCA, etc. For other courses, candidates have to register with their qualifying exam score. Once selection process is over, selected aspirants need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Does UKA Tarsadia University accept MAT score?
faqs.answer: Yes, UKA Tarsadia University accepts MAT score for admission to MBA programme. MAT is a national-level entrance conducted byAllIndia.Management Association (AIMA). Besides, candidates can also apply for MBA with CAT or MAT scores. Selected candidates have to participate in ACPC Counselling.

faqs.question: What factors decide GUJCET cut off marks for engineering?
faqs.answer: GUJCET cut off marks depends on how many students appear, paper difficulty, board marks weightage and branch demand. More popular the branch, the higher the cut off goes. Seats reserved for category or EWS also affects final cut off.

placement_data.title: UKA Tarsadia University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: UKA Tarsadia University has a dedicated training and placement cell that acts as a bridge between potential employers and students for placement-related activities. The University also organises summer internships, industrial visits, expert lectures and industrial training programs for students to make them industry-ready.
According to the official data, the highest package offered during UKA Tarsadia University’s Department of Management SRIMCA MBA placements 2024 stood at INR 4.75 LPA .
Earlier, the overall highest and average package offered during UKA Tarsadia University placements 2022 stood at INR 9.5 LPA and INR 2.75 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: What is the average package offered during MBA placements at UKA Tarsadia University?
faqs.answer: UKA Tarsadia University MBA average package data is not released. However, the highest package offered during UKA Tarsadia University's Department of Management SRIMCA MBA placements 2024 stood at INR 4.75 LPA. Earlier, the highest package offered during placements 2023 and 2022 stood at INR 4 LPA.

faqs.question: How good is placement for UKA TARSADIA BPHARM students?
faqs.answer: The placement cell at UKA Tarsadia University facilitates between students and companies. It helps final year students get placed by inviting good pharma companies and giving them proper training too. The university also arranges seminars, workshops, company visits and summer internships so that students learn skills early and get ready for industry work.

faqs.question: Which companies generally visit the UKA Tarsadia University campus during placements?

faqs.question: Is Uka Tarsadia University good for placements?
faqs.answer: Hello. As per what I've heard, from 7th sem students are eligible for placement and internship. A number of companies visits, around 30+ companies. Many good companies visits for placement cell like Adani, Reliance etc. the highest package till journeys is 10.6 lakh/annum. Almost 80% of students get places each year. Sometimes, they provide campus interviews from the 5th and 6th semesters depending upon the results of the last 2 years. The ratio of employment via campus placement is very high. Hope this will help u. Thank you

cut_off.college_name: UKA Tarsadia University Cutoff 2025: Check GUJCET Previous Years Ranks

description: UKA Tarsadia University cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The UKA Tarsadia University cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the UKA Tarsadia University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 35234 and 38887 for the General HS category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Engineering. The first round cutoff ran

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the HS quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 35234 for the general HS quota.
On the contrary, the least competitive specialisation for admission in 2024 was B.Tech. in Information Technology with closing cutoff rank of .

Uka Tarsadia University accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to UKA Tarsadia University can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

The UKA Tarsadia University GUJCET cutoff 2024 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to engineering and pharmacy courses at the UG level. The cutoff was released across categories in the AI and HS quotas. Considering the UKA Tarsadia University BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the minimum closing ranks required among the general HS category students was 35234.

UKA Tarsadia University accepts the GUJCET entrance exam, followed by a counseling process for admission to its BE and BTech courses. In the table below, candidates can view the past three years' cutoff trends for different courses, specialisations, rounds, and categories.

As per the last round cutoff 2024, B.Tech. in Computer Engineering demonstrated a consistent rise in its closing ranks over the past three years for the general HS category candidates. In 2024, the final round cutoff of the c

For the academic year 2025, UKA Tarsadia University accepts GUJCET 2025 entrance exam score for admission to BE/BTech and BPharma courses followed by the counselling process. The counselling dates are yet to be announced. Candidates seeking admission to UKA Tarsadia University can refer to the table below for GUJCET 2025 important dates.

UKA Tarsadia University GUJCET 2024 counselling was concluded with the release of the Round 3 Seat Allotment Result. Candidates can refer to the table below to view or download the consolidated year-wise counselling PDFs to check the GUJCET cutoffs.

hostel_campus.college_name: UKA Tarsadia University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: You will feel like school.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are the best. If you want to enjoy, you are welcome. But the facilities are less for studying. Don't trust anyone in UTU as no one is deserving of it except some people as they always facts to be nice with you in front of you.

reviews.review_heading: It is excellent. I personally feel good in my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over campus. It has all facilities with a big playground and a big canteen. The hostel has the best food with full facilities and a security guard. Students get vegetarian food. We can see the attractive look of the college. All classrooms are fully furnished.

reviews.review_heading: Needs major improvement in faculty and practical learning. Provides average placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at Uka Tarsadia University for B.Tech IT is below average. Classrooms are basic with limited SMART features. Labs are often overcrowded, and many computers are outdated. Wi-Fi is available but frequently unreliable. Library has a decent collection, but many books are outdated. Hostel rooms are small and lack proper ventilation and cleanliness. Mess food is repetitive, often tasteless, and not very hygienic. Canteen offers limited options at high prices. Medical facilities are mini...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the great faculty members, good placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. The quality of the food is great. The hostel has a separate canteen and living rooms for both girls and boys. It provides food three times. Morning and breakfast are sufficient and tasty for living a healthy lifestyle. We have a laundry facility five times a week for use.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best university in Gujarat.
reviews.review_text: In our classroom and throughout the whole campus, every student has a high-speed internet connection. Computers in labs also have high-speed internet. Lab infrastructure is great. We have many labs, and medical and other facilities are great too.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in the Surat area.
reviews.review_text: In our classroom and throughout the whole campus, we have a high-speed internet connection. Computers in labs also have high-speed internet, and the lab infrastructure is great. We have around 40 to 50 labs in total, and medical and other facilities are great too.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend students to take admission if they are searching for a good & affordable college.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent. Classrooms with projectors, AC, etc. The best thing about the college is the library. Our department has a separate library and a central library for every department. Our library has approximately 2 lakh books. The central library is fully air-conditioned and has monitors to issue books. Book entry and exit are managed by ID cards, and without an ID card, no entry is allowed. I am not from the hostel, so I don't have information about it.

reviews.review_heading: I am well-satisfied with the faculty members, education, and good placements in 2025.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides free Wi-Fi all over campus. Labs are well-maintained with high-speed PCs. There are also other labs like 3D printing lab, BEE lab, DLD lab, hardware lab, etc. Classrooms are good and we got the biggest library in Surat. I don't know about the hostel. The mess and canteen serve the best quality of food.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2024, nice labs, and awesome college life.
reviews.review_text: Our college has some of the best labs, Wi-Fi, a library, and sports facilities. Wi-Fi is available throughout the college, and hostels also have Wi-Fi. They give personal as well as shared rooms. We also have nice sports facilities, like table tennis, a football ground, a cricket ground, and many more. The computer labs are just awesome. The best, according to me is the iOS lab, where every student gets their own PC. There are many canteens and shops available throughout the college, offering a ...

reviews.review_heading: The best college gives the best memories, so choose your college wisely.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good enough, we have full campus Wi-Fi, a campus bus, fully air-conditioned labs, and the best faculty. The library is very good and big enough. I don’t live in the hostel, but heard from my friends that the food is of good quality. Also, the food is available in the mess and canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Uka Tarsadia University in the Bachelor of Science in Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi does not work at all on our devices. Classrooms are big and large with projectors. There are 2 libraries with many books. The quality is nice, but it is also expensive. It is free for the students to the canteen. Some of the shops don't allow students to eat their home lunchbox inside it.

reviews.review_heading: The best college gives students with the best memories.
reviews.review_text: Facilities we get in the college are Wi-Fi in every class, good labs, and the best library. The food is of the best quality. There are a lot of sports and games. I have taken a computer engineering diploma after which I am doing a degree in computer engineering from the same college.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is fine and well-maintained except for the issue of less faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very well and well-maintained by the authorities. Everything is well-maintained, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and even the campus is also well-maintained. The main thing I found attractive is the central library of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Best private university in Bardoli.
reviews.review_text: There are a lot of Wi-Fi hotspots with the best internet speed. There are a lot of labs, and the libraries are huge. The campus has a lot of grounds, and the canteen is good. There are also a lot of good study tables.

reviews.review_heading: THE LIFE AT UKA TARSADIA UNIVERSITY
reviews.review_text:
The hostel is good and students are also very cooperative and friendly. 
The cleanliness of the hostel is very good and the rooms are also clean. 
The food quality is decent and the rent is also very good in UkaTtarsadia university. 
Overall accommodation of the college is good.

data.description: Students can choose hostel as per comfort and budget. Boys hostels cost near INR 70,000 to INR 74,000 per year for one to four seater rooms. There is also budget hostel like Diwaliba Polytechnic or Bardoli Campus for Nursing girls for INR 44,000 per year with free transport and refundable deposit of INR 3,000. Always confirm your hostel cost before admission.

paragraphs: The BSc tuition fee at Uka Tarsadia University is INR 1.3 Lacs – INR 4.8 lakh depending on the specialisation chosen. The range consists of 16 courses offered by the university which are offered with varying tuition fees. Candidates taking admission into the BSc programme at the university should check the specialisation they are choosing so as to make an informed decision about the fees to be paid at the university.

Uka Tarsadia BBA fees are in the range of INR 1.8 – INR 2.8 lakh, depending on the type of course chosen. The university offers a three-year BBA programme and a four-year BBA (Hons.) programme, therefore candidates will have to pay the tuition fee over three or four years, depending on their choice. They will also have to pay some amount at the time of admission.

Uka Tarsadia University offers UG programme across various streams such as Science, Commerce, Management, Engineering, and others. The fee structure is cumulative of multiple components, such as tuition fee, hostel fee, medical insurance, mess and other security deposits, etc. The fee structure of UG courses of Uka Tarsadia has been mentioned below:

UKA Tarsadia University offers Shri BU Patel Research Fellowship to PhD students. The fellowship is offered to young candidates for pursuing research in technical education. A scholarship amount of INR 12,000 per month is offered to students under this fellowship.

review_summary.college_name: B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Voc. in (MLT) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The course is excellent, with good labs, faculty, and placement support.

content.Placements: In our course, around 70-80 percent of students are placed or receive internship opportunities. They are mostly selected based on their practical knowledge in this field. Our course is vocational, i.e., more practical-oriented than theory. Our college has tie-ups with reputed diagnostic centres and hospitals in Mumbai and Thane regions, like Metropolis Healthcare, SRL Diagnostics, Fortis Hospital, and some local pathology labs. Students who go for PG are eligible for their own collection centre license and can start their own business. Roles of this course are Medical Lab Technician and Phlebotomist.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in (Chemistry, Microbiology, Botany) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Great campus, good crowd, but placements are not up to the mark.

content.Placements: No placements as such, the batch went for the Master's. A great opportunity for research rather than jobs. M.Sc. students are getting placed rather than B.Sc students. 3 students got an internship in BARC. They were under different experiments and projects in the BARC for 6 months.
content.Infrastructure: We did not have any Wi-Fi, but labs were well-equipped and classrooms were great. The NR building has new labs which are in good condition and have specialized labs for botany, Zoology, microbiology, and Chemistry. Library is decent, with 2 separate study halls for boys and girls.

content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are pretty decent. But some improvements can be made. Maths lab is in goob condition. Library is also good. Canteen is always full, and small in size but okay. Hostels are not available. There is a shortage of classes sometimes.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in CBZ (Chemistry, Botany, Zoology) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: B. K. Birla is such a good college.

content.Placements: More than 50 students get placed in this course. As per the placement data available, 465 out of 1925 eligible students got placed at a median package of 2.16 LPA in 2024, and 245 out of 772 eligible students got placed at a median package of 2.10 LPA in 2024. There is no change in the number of placements and median package compared to the data from 2023.
content.Infrastructure: B. K. Birla College in Kalyan offers a range of infrastructure facilities for courses but does not provide on-campus hostel accommodation. Students who need hostel facilities seek private accommodation near the campus. They provide fast Wi-Fi, and labs are very clean.

outlook.description:
B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce has been ranked well by the Outlook-ICARE under the 'Science' category. Through the years, the Outlook-ICARE rankings for B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the Outlook-ICARE. It has been seen that in the 'Science' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2025, B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce's rank is #28, the same as last year's rank in the 'Science' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
It has been noticed that in the 'Arts' category, the institute's ranking has steadiness when compared against previous year's ranking. In 2025, B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce's rank is #32, the same as last year's rank in the 'Arts' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The institute has displayed stability in trend in the 'Commerce' category when compared with the ranking of preceding years. In 2025, B.K. Birla College of Arts, Science and Commerce's rank is #39, the same as last year's rank in the 'Commerce' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
