labs.description: Available Facilities: Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab

reviews.review_heading: The course is excellent, with good labs, faculty, and placement support.
reviews.review_text: In B.K. Birla College, they provide well-equipped laboratories with all the necessary instruments for biochemistry, hematology, and microbiology in clean and sterile conditions. We have a library with a good collection of books, approximately 10 lakh, as well as computer access for academic activities. We have sports facilities, including a badminton court, a large ground, an indoor area for indoor games, and a gymkhana.

reviews.review_heading: Great campus, good crowd, but placements are not up to the mark.
reviews.review_text: We did not have any Wi-Fi, but labs were well-equipped and classrooms were great. The NR building has new labs which are in good condition and have specialized labs for botany, Zoology, microbiology, and Chemistry. Library is decent, with 2 separate study halls for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Best for simple graduation.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are pretty decent. But some improvements can be made. Maths lab is in goob condition. Library is also good. Canteen is always full, and small in size but okay. Hostels are not available. There is a shortage of classes sometimes.

reviews.review_heading: Helpful faculty members, strict about security, best event, fest, and library.
reviews.review_text: I am student of B.Sc. mathematics so in my department, sources like books from library, computer lab, headphones, and Wi-Fi connection are available in huge quantity in mathematics department. Fees are affordable but good part is that there is scholarship so you will get your fee back.

reviews.review_heading: B. K. Birla is such a good college.
reviews.review_text: B. K. Birla College in Kalyan offers a range of infrastructure facilities for courses but does not provide on-campus hostel accommodation. Students who need hostel facilities seek private accommodation near the campus. They provide fast Wi-Fi, and labs are very clean.

reviews.review_heading: If you are searching for a fantastic college, then you have come to the right place.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It is known as Birla College, where you can do junior college courses and other technical courses for graduation. There is also a sports ground where you can go and play any game you want.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, helpful faculty, decent placements, and a campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our department is well-equipped with modern infrastructure and facilities. It has air-conditioned modern classrooms with smart boards and projectors, high-speed Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, and a rich library. The canteen provides nutritious food. Medical and sports management and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The greatest college for students to upgrade their skills.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are okay but neat and clean. Washrooms are also clean, but the canteens are crowded all the time. They provide the best facilities to hang out with friends and learn new skills,  like the gym, gaming space, and sports ground. Teachers and staff are so friendly.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty, the placement is average, but the campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: AC classrooms with big benches and a clean environment, big windows for proper ventilation, and a gym with proper equipment. There is a tennis court, indoor and outdoor laboratories of Botany, Zoology, Chemistry, and a library. Laptop lab, seminar halls for masterclasses and workshops.

reviews.review_heading: The Best batch of 2024 was given to us.
reviews.review_text: See, the college doesn’t have any hostel, but the process of building one is ongoing. The classrooms of the college are very good. Even this year, the rooms were made better. They provide us with projectors, Wi-Fi, and the campus is very good. The library has a separate building.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty, campus, food, and good professors.
reviews.review_text:
We have classrooms, well developed labs, Wi-Fi, pc, library, reading room, etc. Quality of food is 10/10
Gaming room is good, We also have gcr for girls 
Library has section for girls and boys
Washrooms has privacy for girls and for emergency everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: Great faculty, supportive professors, average infrastructure, great security.
reviews.review_text: We do have a Gymkhana, the library is good, a huge ground, canteen, Chemistry and Physics labs, medical unit, and a big infrastructure for that matter with the best security—100/10 for security in our college. It's big, has an NCC unit, and many more such groups such as Rotaract clubs. It helps a lot in self-development.

reviews.review_heading: We had a really good infrastructure, nice college life, very helpful teachers, and coordinators.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided were very good. The college has a good ambiance to study. The canteen has fresh food. There is an opportunity for good sports persons, and you get good opportunities. There is a nice big library and separate rooms for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but average college life with a lot of fests every now and then.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the overall college is good. Plenty of space to roam and greenery. Availability of gym (although rundown) and a fair ground. Labs are well maintained and the buildings and washrooms are cleaned from time to time. Washrooms for disabled are available on each floor but there is no ramp available for them.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure and good faculty, but limited placement opportunities in IT.
reviews.review_text: We have separate IT labs for the IT department with fast and wide Ethernet connections. It does not have hostel facilities, but the food quality of the mess and canteen is very good as they take proper measures for social hygiene. They also have medical facilities for emergency situations with proper medical staff. They also have proper equipment for sports and games as they provide sports events and competitions to encourage student participation.

college_info.intro: Bangalore Clinical Research Institute courses include BSc, MBA and MSc as some of the popular programmes offered in full-time mode. The Institute offers these courses for the duration of 2 years to 3 years with a tuition fees ranging from INR 1.05 Lakh to INR 5 Lakh. ICRI Bangalore admissions can be availed by qualifying entrance exams and securing valid scores in the same. For more details around ICRI Bangalore popular programmes, check out the table below:

placements.overview: The Institute has not yet updated 2024 placement stats. However, the same will be reflected here once out. ICRI placements of all the eight campuses are conducted centrally by the authorities of Institute of Clinical Research of India. Placements are conducted through campus recruitment process. The recruiting companies follow the standard selection procedure for campus placements. ICRI Bangalore offers an impressive 100 per cent placement record in various streams such as Clinical Research, Healthcare and Pharmacovigilance and offers high ROI. Major industries and top recruiters included:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, ICRI Bangalore - Institute of Clinical Research India Bangalore offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time and Part Time courses, from streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.Sc., BBA and UG Diploma courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM, Executive MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The ICRI Bangalore - Institute of Clinical Research India Bangalore course fee ranges between INR 30,000 to 5,00,000.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Oct -2022) Executive M.Sc. in Clinical Research - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I am not at all satisfied with the institute and course curriculum.

review_content.Placements: Placements are not very great here. Many of the students were not placed, but only a few students got placed. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. There was no placement cell. All the students get internships but after a lot of hard work. I wouldn't rely on the placements of ICRI for jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was average. They assure that they provide books in the beginning, but they didn't provide. Later on, they provided, but it was too late. There was no canteen, which makes difficult for daily meals. Classrooms were okay here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Discontinued (Oct -2022) Masters in Management Studies - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Best Infrastructure & Placement in ICRI.

review_content.Placements: The placements in our batch were quite good, much better than the previous year's placing record. The companies that come for recruitment change from year to year depending on their recruiting needs, but rest assured that if you have a strong track record of performance and are a diligent worker, you'll be put where you want to be, whether it's an MNC or a burgeoning start-up. HCL, Johnson & Johnson, Cognizant technology, Accenture, Novartis Healthcare, Pfizer, Quintiles, and others were among the regular recruiters.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is accessible across the campus. There are no restrictions on how much you can use it. All of the classrooms have projectors and are fully air-conditioned. The library includes books of all kinds, with a varied rental period for different classes of students. Almost all of the main journals and databases are accessible through the library's online portal.

review_summary.college_name: ICRI Bangalore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct -2022) Executive M.Sc. in Clinical Research - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am not at all satisfied with the institute and course curriculum.

content.Placements: Placements are not very great here. Many of the students were not placed, but only a few students got placed. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. There was no placement cell. All the students get internships but after a lot of hard work. I wouldn't rely on the placements of ICRI for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was average. They assure that they provide books in the beginning, but they didn't provide. Later on, they provided, but it was too late. There was no canteen, which makes difficult for daily meals. Classrooms were okay here.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Oct -2022) Masters in Management Studies - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Best Infrastructure & Placement in ICRI.

content.Placements: The placements in our batch were quite good, much better than the previous year's placing record. The companies that come for recruitment change from year to year depending on their recruiting needs, but rest assured that if you have a strong track record of performance and are a diligent worker, you'll be put where you want to be, whether it's an MNC or a burgeoning start-up. HCL, Johnson & Johnson, Cognizant technology, Accenture, Novartis Healthcare, Pfizer, Quintiles, and others were among the regular recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is accessible across the campus. There are no restrictions on how much you can use it. All of the classrooms have projectors and are fully air-conditioned. The library includes books of all kinds, with a varied rental period for different classes of students. Almost all of the main journals and databases are accessible through the library's online portal.

placement_report.college_name: ICRI Bangalore Placements 2025 - Highest & Average Salary Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: ICRI Bangalore - Institute of Clinical Research India Bangalore Placement overview
paragraphs: ICRI Bangalore boasts of 100% placements offered to its students in various streams such as Clinical Research, Healthcare and Pharmacovigilance . ICRI placements of all the eight campuses are conducted centrally by the authorities of Institute of Clinical Research of India.

The institute offers students with plenty of employment opportunities and career prospects. It offers ample amount of industry exposure to enhance the students' employability. It has an impressive placement record and offers high ROI.

The institute conducts placement sessions and recruitment drives at the end of every year. Over the years, numerous ICRI students have secured high-paying jobs in clinical research, healthcare, logistics, retail, air freight, manufacturing, cargo freight, pharma, banking, automobile and aviation industries.
Various companies are invited to ICRI campus by the active placement cell. Here is the step-by-step process of placements at ICRI:
Q. How are the placements at ICRI? What is their recruitment process?
A. ICRI has a 100% placement record. Placements are conducted through campus recruitment process. The recruiting companies for campus placements follow the standard selection procedure.
Q. What is the placement process of ICRI Bangalore?

A. The college has an active placement cell which handles all the placement related tasks. Various companies are invited to the pre-placement talk on the assigned date. Test/ Group Discussion is conducted by the company followed by a personal interview of the shortlisted students. Results are declared within 2-3 days from the interview.
Q. Who are the major recruiters of ICRI?
Q. Does ICRI offer internships to its students?

A. Yes, companies offer internship /industrial training to its students. Industrial Visits / Seminars / Conferences / Guest Lectures are also conducted by the institute to give students insights about the various activities involved in the industries.

. ICRI placements of all the eight campuses are conducted centrally by the authorities of Institute of Clinical Research of India.
ICRI Bangalore Placements 2020
The institute offers students with plenty of employment opportunities and career prospects. It offers ample amount of industry exposure to enhance the students' employability. It has an impressive placement record and offers high ROI.
The institute conducts placement sessions and recruitment drives at the end of every year. Over the years, numerous ICRI students have secured high-paying jobs in clinical research, healthcare, logistics, retail, air freight, manufacturing, cargo freight, pharma, banking, automobile and aviation industries.
ICRI Bangalore Placement Process 2020
Various companies are invited to ICRI campus by the active placement cell. Here is the step-by-step process of placements at ICRI:
Companies are given an option to go to any one of the eight campuses for recruitment of students
Companies are assigned a convenient date to follow-up for negotiation
After confirmation provided by the company, a pre-placement talk is arranged on the date with ICRI authorities
After that, companies conduct a test and/or Group Discussion (GD) to shortlist the interested candidates
Shortlisted candidates are then interviewed for final selection by the company
Result of the final selection is usually announced on the day of interview or within 2-3 days
ICRI Bangalore Top Companies 2020
Important FAQs regarding ICRI Bangalore Placements
Q. How are the placements at ICRI? What is their recruitment process?
A. ICRI has a 100% placement record. Placements are conducted through campus recruitment process. The recruiting companies for campus placements follow the standard selection procedure.
Q. What is the placement process of ICRI Bangalore?
A. The college has an active placement cell which handles all the placement related tasks. Various companies are invited to the pre-placement talk on the assigned date. Test/ Group Discussion is conducted by the company followed by a personal interview of the shortlisted students. Results are declared within 2-3 days from the interview.
Q. Who are the major recruiters of ICRI?
A. List of major recruiters that visit ICRI Bangalore for recruitment are mentioned below:
Clinical Research & Healthcare Management:
Bioxcel, Cipla, Max Healthcare, Apollo, Fortis, etc.
Pharmacovigilance & Clinical Data Management:
Accenture, Allergan Medical, Cognizant, Genpact, etc.
Logistics:
Tata, Ashok Leyland, DHL, DTDC, FedEx, etc.
Aviation:
British Airways, GAAR, IndiGo, Lufthansa, etc.
Automobile:
Jaguar, BMW, Renault, Audi, etc.
Banking and Finance:
ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, SBI bank, etc.
Fashion:
H&M, Fabindia, Levi’s, ZARA, etc.
Q. Does ICRI offer internships to its students?
A. Yes, companies offer internship /industrial training to its students. Industrial Visits / Seminars / Conferences / Guest Lectures are also conducted by the institute to give students insights about the various activities involved in the industries.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B Sc. at STAREX University?
overview_faqs.answer: Tution fee for B.Sc. i STAREX University is around 1.6L-3.9L, with the total including some more such as examination fees (and as per one's requirements) hostel and mess fees, with the average number going around 1.2L Per year for many students.So you must look at the expenses individually to decide whether you would have to spend some money there or not.

overview_faqs.question: Does Starex University follow semester pattern for MBA programme?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, the DPharma course at Starex University follows the semester pattern. It offers DPharma with a two-year course duration where the students complete the coursework in more than one Pharmatics discipline. However, there are two semesters in an DPharma academic year, and therefore systematic learning and assessments are smoothly run throughout. A semester-wise format offers students the added ability to handle workloads in the semesters of the DPharma programme.

review_summary.college_name: Starex University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Radio and Imaging Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I think there are no good placements here. I did not see or hear from any student about this.

content.Placements: A very few students attend the college regularly. Teachers do not come to the classroom. Students go for internships at their own risk. The college treats internships as a very last option, because it seems like the paramedics course is a waste in this college.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi in classes or labs, and the classrooms are not cleaned properly. It is cleaned only once a week. It is in very poor condition, with a school-type desk, and there is no proper seating at the desk. It is very painful, I daily think why I should go to college or waste money, one should opt for this college at their own risk.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (AI & ML) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Pretty decent college with good infrastructure and average placement ratio.

content.Placements: The placement ratio of Starex University is not very good; maybe 2 out of 10 students get placed on average. The highest package is somewhere around 10 LPA, and the average is 3.6 LPA. Most of the students are hired by new startups and some of the MNCs like Wipro, TCS, etc. The internship ratio is very low; 1 out of 10 get a paid internship here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decently good at Starex University. It gives a foreign university vibe. Classrooms and the library are well-maintained, and no Wi-Fi is allowed for students. The hostel is also decent with all the required facilities. The hostel warden is very good and supportive.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good until we talk about placements.

content.Placements: Only, on average, 20% of students get placed. The highest package is around 320000 and the lowest package is 120000. Companies like Cipla, Medicament, etc. are the top recruiters. 60 to 70 percent students get internship in various companies like Medicament, etc. Roles offered are quality control, analysis, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our department, like WiFi, labs, classrooms and libraries. Our classroom has ACs. The hostel facility was also good; the food was not bad. On our campus, we have a hospital so medical facilities are available 24 hours a day. All types of sports are available in our college like football, cricket, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Master in Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: College gives the best experience.

content.Placements: The placement process starts with NASSCOM, which has a tie-up with the University, providing perfect training for placements. Once we train and reach the final year, placements start with big firms like Accenture, IBM, Merkle, Seagate, Deloitte, and Amazon conducting campus interviews. The salary package is different for all companies, with the highest being 15 LPA and the average being 5-6 LPA. In our batch, the college did not provide internships. They tried their best; maybe they can start internships from this year. Roles depend on the company.

individual_reviews.course: Master in Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Previous year, 80% of students were placed in various companies.

content.Placements: For us (MBA ) end of 2nd semester we are eligible for placement drives but for a job after 3rd semester is complete the college will grant permission to join the job and also have an opportunity for an off-campus drive. Around 15 to 18 companies visited our college and around 75 to 80 percent of students got placement. Our courses the highest package is 14 lac and our course average package is around 5 lac. Some of the students make startups and join the jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Modern hostel facilities are provided separately for both boys and girls of the college. The rooms at the hostel have basic facilities and are fully furnished with furniture that helps the students to study and live there peaceful. The entire hostel is Wi-Fi enabled and has 24 into 7 electricity and water supply. Feels for the hostel are as follows- For AC rooms, single-sharing rooms cost around 1.3 Lacs per year. Twin sharing 1.2 Lacs per year. Triple sharing 1.1 Lacs per year. For AC rooms, twin sharing is 1 Lacs per year, and for triple sharing, it is 90000 per year.

admission_overview.college_name: Starex University Course Admissions 2025: Fee, Eligibility, Selection, Application Process, Placements

paragraphs: Starex University admissionsare both merit and entrance-based. Candidates need to appear for the test or personal interview round to get admission in UG or PG programmes.Starex Universityoffers more than 48 courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels. The university offers courses in multiple streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Commerce, etc. Interested candidates can fill out the application form online.

The university offers courses in full-time mode through 12 schools. BPharm, BTech and MBA are some of the popular courses offered by the university. Below are the key highlights forStarex University admissions:
Particulars
Starex University Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
How to apply?
https://www.starexuniversity.com/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
Starex University Course Details

The university offers admission based on a test or personal interview round. Candidates need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below are popularStarex University coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Starex University opens the registration portal as a first step of the admission process. Candidates are first required to apply for the preferred course. Below are the steps to get a seat in the university:
STEP 1: Starex University Application Process 2025

Candidates need to apply for the course of their choice via online mode. Aspirants will need to register with the basic details to generate the login credentials. Candidates have to pay an application fee to register for a course at Starex University.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the application process is completed, the university starts selecting candidates for admission. The selection is based on test scores or performance in the personal interview round. Based on performance in the selection rounds, aspirants become eligible for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment

After the final selection is over, candidates are informed by mail or call by the authorities. These students then need to get their documents verified and pay the admission fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What is the placement package offered at Starex University?
faqs.answer: The median package has been released for the BPharma. From 2022 to 2023, an upsurge of 25% was recorded. Refer to the table below to know the Starex University placement package for the past two years: Course Median Package (2022) Median Package (2023) BPharma INR 2 LPA INR 2.50 LPA NOTE: The above salary details are fetched from the NIRF report 2024.

faqs.question: How is the placement at Starex University?
faqs.answer: The official placement report or brochure has not been released. However, the NIRF report 2024 is out, incorporating the 2023 placement statistics. Out of 76 BPharma graduates 37 were successfully placed during the 2023 drive. Check the complete insights of Starex University placements 2023 from the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2023) Total students (BPharma) 76 Students placed (BPharma) 37 Median package (BPharma) INR 2.50 LPA NOTE: The above placement statistics are fetched from the NIRF report 2024 (Pharmacy).

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can seek after completing BCom degree at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Yes, students who are pursuing their BCom degree from Starex University can apply to any government job. They can look forward to placements related to Finance, Auditing, Financial Administration, Taxation, etc. For most of the government jobs, graduates are required to appear for competitive exams conducted by various recruiting organisations. Tabulated below are some prospective government jobs for BCom graduates along with their average salaries: Bank Probationary Officer (PO): INR 5 LPA to INR 7 LPA LIC AAO: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS Clerk: INR 2 LPA to INR 3 LPA RRB NTPC: INR 6 LPA to INR 8 LPA SSC CHSL: INR 3 LPA to INR 4 LPA IBPS PO: INR 5 LPA to INR 6 LPA Note: The above-mentioned salary package are industry-based average payouts. The actual salary may vary.

faqs.question: What is the cost of studying BPharm at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Starex University BPharmacy fees include multiple components such as tuition fees, hostel fees, caution deposits, admission fees, alumni charges, library membership, etc. The total tuition fee for the four-year course is INR 3 lakh and the hostel charges are up to INR 96,000 and one-time fee is INR 5,000 . This given tuition fee is as per the Haryana State Technical Education Society and is calculated as per the first-year semester fee. Hence, the amount may vary.

faqs.question: Is it expensive to study BTech at Starex University?
faqs.answer: Find below the fee structure for Starex University Gurgaon BTech course: Component Fee Tuition fees INR 3.2 lakh Hostel fees INR 1.4 lakh Security charges for non-AC in hostel INR 5,000 (refundable) Electricity charges in hostel 150 units free and after that INR 12 per unit NOTE: The above-mentioned fees is as per unofficial sources. Hence, the actual amount may vary.
tables: Security charges for non-AC in hostel
150 units free and after that INR 12 per unit

faqs.question: What is the fee for B Sc. at STAREX University?
faqs.answer: Tution fee for B.Sc. i STAREX University is around 1.6L-3.9L, with the total including some more such as examination fees (and as per one's requirements) hostel and mess fees, with the average number going around 1.2L Per year for many students.So you must look at the expenses individually to decide whether you would have to spend some money there or not.

faqs.question: What is the fees of Starex University for MBA?
faqs.answer: The fee for the Starex University Gurgaon MBA course is INR 3 lakh . This course fee is calculated on the basis of first-semester fees and includes components such as tuition fees. The candidates availing of the hostel facilities have to pay the hostel charges as well, which sums up to INR 2.25 lakh . In addition, the mentioned hostel fee is for Non-AC (3-Sharing) plus the security charges. At the time of application form filling, aspirants have to pay the application fee as well to submit the form successfully.

hostel.description: Starex University provides hostels accommodation for both boys and girls. All the hostels have basic amenities like 24*7 water and electricity supply, common room, recreation room, mess, laundry services, security and surveillance system etc.

library.description: Starex University's library is well stocked with a large collection of learning and information material both in print and electronic format with the latest collection of books, journals, magazines, e-journals, eBooks and databases from globally known publishers. It is also fully automated using KOHA – Integrated Library Management System, OPAC and also provides with repography services like printing and scanning.

paragraphs: Tution fee for B.Sc. i STAREX University is around 1.6L-3.9L, with the total including some more such as examination fees (and as per one's requirements) hostel and mess fees, with the average number going around 1.2L Per year for many students.So you must look at the expenses individually to decide whether you would have to spend some money there or not.

The fee for the Starex University Gurgaon MBA course is INR 3 lakh. This course fee is calculated on the basis of first-semester fees and includes components such as tuition fees. The candidates availing of the hostel facilities have to pay the hostel charges as well, which sums up to INR 2.25 lakh. In addition, the mentioned hostel fee is for Non-AC (3-Sharing) plus the security charges. At the time of application form filling, aspirants have to pay the application fee as well to submit the form successfully.

STAREX University is moderately costly if we see other factors side by side. The B.Tech fees at this University is around INR 3.2 lakh- 4.8 lakh and the MBA fees is also around INR 3 lakh. It can be said that the fees in not too much expensive but is expensive. Other colleges charge less fees than this as offer better ROI than this university. The average package offered is INR 10 LPA and average is INR 3 LPA. Seeing the return on fees invested, it's okay. So if  a student is trying to pursue any course from this university he/she should consider other factors also such as Facility, Infrastructure etc. and feedback from current students should also be taken.

The fee for all the various courses at the Starex university varies greatly depending upon the duration and specialisation of the program. Tution fee for MBA is around 3L Tution fee for MCA is around 1.4L Tution fee for B.Sc. is around 1.6L-3.9L Tution fee for B.Pharma is around 3L Tution fee for BPT is around 3.2L Tution fee for M.Sc. is around 1L-1.6L Tution fee for B.E./B.Tech is around 3.2L-4.8L
just to give some insights, One must look at official recent sources too as the values might change from time to time.

college_info.intro: Alard University offers three-year BBA, BSc, BA, and other courses to students at the undergraduate level. At the postgraduate level, Alard University Pune offers one to two-year MA, MSc, and MBA courses to students. The university also offers PG diplomas and PhD courses to students. The flagship programme offered at Alard University is the BTech. The institute provides this programme to students at the undergraduate level. The university offers the BTech programme for a duration of 4 years with a comprehensive curriculum. Alard University courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Below mentioned are some of the courses, along with the Alard University fees and their respective eligibility:

placements.overview: Alard University admission is a mix of both merit and entrance. The university offers several programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These courses are offered across multiple fields, such as Law, Technology, Engineering, Management, Science, etc. Alard University accepts valid scores of relevant entrance exams, in addition to conducting its own entrance test to shortlist the candidates. The admission and application process for the courses offered at the university . Candidates looking to apply for courses must have passed or equivalent in the relevant stream. Similarly, for , students must have completed in the relevant field. Here is a list of documents required at the time of admission are as follows:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Alard University Pune offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG, PG, PhD, and other levels. These courses are provided across , Business Management, , Pharmacy, , Interdisciplinary Research, Health & Biosciences, and Hospital Administration, among other streams. At the UG level, the university provides BTech, , BCA,, BBA, and others. At the PG level, the university provides MBA, , MSc, , and others. BA is provided in specialisations such as BA (Hons) in Economics, BA (Hons) in Political Science, BA (Hons) in English, BA (Hons) in History, etc. Below mentioned are some of the , and their respective eligibility and Alard University fee structure:

faqs.answer: A:    Alard University admits students on an entrance basis for its BDes programme. Students seeking to get into this course must have completed Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 55% (50% for reserved categories) from a recognised board. Alard University BDes admission is entrance-based. Aspirants need to provide a valid score in any of the following exams; UCEED/ NIFT/ NID DAT/ AIEED/CUET/ FDDI AIST/ AEST Entrance Test.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Alard University BDes admission?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for the popular courses offered by Alard University are as follows:BTech: INR 7.8 Lacs to 9 lakhBSc: INR 3.8 Lacs to 5 lakhBCA: INR 4.4 lakhBDes: INR 6 Lacs to 10 lakhCandidates who clear the admission process and get the final admission offer are eligible to pay the course fee.
faqs.question: What is the fee for the popular courses at Alard University?

faqs.answer: A:    Alard University MBA eligibility requires students to pass graduation from a recognised university with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved category). Additionally, candidates need to provide a valid score in any of the following exams; CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ PERA/ MH-CET/ CUET/ CMAT/ AEST. The final selection is done on the basis of the candidate's performance in GDPI conducted by the university. Eligible students can apply for Alard University MBA admissions by visiting the official website of the university:
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Alard University MBA admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Alard University MBA admission is entrance-based. Students need to provide a valid score of accepted test to be eligible for admission. However, CAT is not the only test that the university accepts. Students can also provide valid scores obtained in other management entrance tests, such as MAT/ XAT/ PERA/ MH-CET/ CMAT, etc. Alternatively, candidates can appear for the Alard University's entrance test as well. Hence, yes, you may get admission into the MBA course offered at Alard University without appearing for the CAT exam provided you have cleared any of the other accepted exams.
faqs.question: Can I get into Alard University for MBA without CAT?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Ok ok college Placement record are not good

review_content.Placements: In 2024 I passed out. I didn’t find the college that good. Placements are 3.5/10, and the location isn’t great either. In this college, not many companies come; only one or two companies come in a year. Placement was not good. In this college, companies like Advance, IKS, and Take Care Health Solution come—just two or three companies, not many.
review_content.Infrastructure: Okay college, but no Wi-Fi. Sports facilities are not good, so children don’t enjoy them, and the food isn’t good, etc. Also, the facilities provided include labs, classrooms, and a library. Many more activities are conducted for study. Many kinds of games are available, like football, cricket, throw ball, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is pretty good in overall perspectives.

review_content.Placements: Placements are pretty good in the college. They provide placements in major companies like Cipla. The average package is about 15,000/month. One may get placement in the industrial sector. There are also placements for study labs related to pharmacy. Overall, the college is good in terms of placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and all the infrastructure are built in a modern way, keeping in mind the growing technology. They provide Wi-Fi on every floor of the college. Proper amenities are also provided for the library. Hostel rooms are average, and the food is of good quality.

review_summary.college_name: Alard University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: No college is very good. I got internship at this college.

content.Placements: Best college for B.Tech 60 out of 55 students are placed. The best college for CSE faculty is also very helpful. All events are celebrated, and the college also provides a internship to every student, and many companies hire many students, and 2 or 3 companies have partnered with the college.
content.Infrastructure: College building area is clean and in touch with the hostel. Hostel fees are also in our budget. The hostel is cleaned daily, and the mess is also very clean and hygienic. The hostel for boys and girls is separate, so no one can interfere with both. It also provides a study table and many more functions celebrated in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for sports.

content.Placements: Placements in this college are pretty decent. They do not have internships, but they do have some companies that offer paid internships. It's not good for internships, but they are good if you only want a degree. Only 2-3 people in a classroom get the opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good as they have nice facilities, such as PCs, and all facilities are good. There are large classrooms for every student to sit in. The canteen facilities are also pretty nice, and sports are nice, as there is a huge turf which is best for sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Ok ok college Placement record are not good

content.Placements: In 2024 I passed out. I didn’t find the college that good. Placements are 3.5/10, and the location isn’t great either. In this college, not many companies come; only one or two companies come in a year. Placement was not good. In this college, companies like Advance, IKS, and Take Care Health Solution come—just two or three companies, not many.
content.Infrastructure: Okay college, but no Wi-Fi. Sports facilities are not good, so children don’t enjoy them, and the food isn’t good, etc. Also, the facilities provided include labs, classrooms, and a library. Many more activities are conducted for study. Many kinds of games are available, like football, cricket, throw ball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is pretty good in overall perspectives.

content.Placements: Placements are pretty good in the college. They provide placements in major companies like Cipla. The average package is about 15,000/month. One may get placement in the industrial sector. There are also placements for study labs related to pharmacy. Overall, the college is good in terms of placement.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and all the infrastructure are built in a modern way, keeping in mind the growing technology. They provide Wi-Fi on every floor of the college. Proper amenities are also provided for the library. Hostel rooms are average, and the food is of good quality.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and campus with sports ground and facilities. Good placements this year.

content.Placements: About 30–40% of the students secure placement through campus drives. It depends on your skills and knowledge whether you get selected or not. The package mainly depends on the job position and the company, but the lowest package can be around 3-4 LPA. Reputed companies like Glenmark, Advantmed, and IKS conduct campus drives. Most of the students obtain internships through the college, which helps them gain industrial knowledge. You can get jobs such as QC, QA, MR and medical coder.
content.Infrastructure: Things I like about college are the campus and the sports field. They have nets for cricket and football grounds, as well as sports equipment. Wifi is available on every floor and in the library. The classrooms are average and could be better. The labs need significant improvements; sometimes, chemicals are not available for practicals. The library is good, with a reading room and a wide selection of pharmaceutical-related books. Most students prefer PG accommodations over the hostel due to the poor quality of food and high fees.

admission_overview.title: Alard University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Alard University admission is a mix of both merit and entrance. The university offers several programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These courses are offered across multiple fields, such as Law, Technology, Engineering, Management, Science, etc. Alard University accepts valid scores of relevant entrance exams, in addition to conducting its own entrance test (AUSET) to shortlist the candidates. The admission and application process for the courses offered at the university mainly commences online. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other admission-related information for Alard University Pune.

eligibility_selection.title: Alard University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Alard University course admission is subject to clearance of the preset eligibility criteria. Candidates looking to apply for UG courses must have passed Class 12 or equivalent in the relevant stream. Similarly, for PG admissions, students need to have completed graduation in the relevant field. The university offers multiple courses, in full-time and regular modes. Students can either provide a valid score of any of the accepted entrances or appear for the Alard University Scholarship and Entrance Test (AUSET). Aspirants can check out the following table to know about the detailed eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popular Alard University courses:

paragraphs: The admission procedure for Alard University Pune involves multiple steps, such as registration, selection, and admission confirmation. Students must ensure that they meet the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying. The admission process commences online. Interested students can refer to the steps explained below to completeAlard University admission process:
Step 1: Alard University Application Process
Students can apply for the course of choice by visiting the university's official website and filling out the application form available online.
Step 2: Alard University Selection Rounds

The university shortlists candidates based on several parameters, such as entrance exam scores, academic merit, GDPI performance, etc. For certain courses, students need to either provide valid entrance exam scores or appear for the entrance test conducted by the university. Further, admission to certain courses, such as MBA also required candidates to appear for the university-level GDPI rounds.
Step 3: Alard University Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to pay the admission fees to secure their spot at the university.

placement_report.college_name: Alard University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Alard University Placement overview
paragraphs: As per the latest report, over 8,000 students were placed from the 2024 passing-out batch. The highest and average package offered during Alard University placements 2024 stood at INR 50 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively . More than 300 recruiters participated and presented various new-age job offers to the batch 2024 of courses like BTech , MBA , MCA , BPharma , etc. The top recruiters of Alard University placements 2024 included TCS, Axis Bank, Amul, Cognizant, Mother Dairy, Pantaloon, Accenture , etc.

Alard University has a Placement team that provides placement assistance to all of its students. The placement process at Alard University includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students.

reviews.review_heading: No college is very good. I got internship at this college.
reviews.review_text: College building area is clean and in touch with the hostel. Hostel fees are also in our budget. The hostel is cleaned daily, and the mess is also very clean and hygienic. The hostel for boys and girls is separate, so no one can interfere with both. It also provides a study table and many more functions celebrated in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good as they have nice facilities, such as PCs, and all facilities are good. There are large classrooms for every student to sit in. The canteen facilities are also pretty nice, and sports are nice, as there is a huge turf which is best for sports.

reviews.review_heading:
Ok ok college 
Placement record are not good
reviews.review_text: Okay college, but no Wi-Fi. Sports facilities are not good, so children don’t enjoy them, and the food isn’t good, etc. Also, the facilities provided include labs, classrooms, and a library. Many more activities are conducted for study. Many kinds of games are available, like football, cricket, throw ball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college is pretty good in overall perspectives.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and all the infrastructure are built in a modern way, keeping in mind the growing technology. They provide Wi-Fi on every floor of the college. Proper amenities are also provided for the library. Hostel rooms are average, and the food is of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and campus with sports ground and facilities. Good placements this year.
reviews.review_text: Things I like about college are the campus and the sports field. They have nets for cricket and football grounds, as well as sports equipment. Wifi is available on every floor and in the library. The classrooms are average and could be better. The labs need significant improvements; sometimes, chemicals are not available for practicals. The library is good, with a reading room and a wide selection of pharmaceutical-related books. Most students prefer PG accommodations over the hostel due to the ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Alard University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on each floor and library. They have provided internet rooms consisting of computers. Separate labs are available for each respective subject. Classrooms have cameras and modern-sized computer-based boards. Each floor consists of water purifiers. We have well-maintained sports turf which is available from 9 AM - 5 PM.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for studies but good for sports.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in my college include laboratories, computer labs, classrooms, and digital boards for an advanced education system. The library is a bit noisy. The college has a good playground with artificial grass (turf), and sports are played daily.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but dissatisfied by the placement cell.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is available, but the canteen food is pathetic, the medical infrastructure is poor, the labs are not fully equipped, the turf football ground is on campus, but they will not allow students to play there, and Wi-Fi is not available in college. The library and sitting areas are good.

reviews.review_heading: This college was above my expectations in terms of faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the CSE course at the Alard Group of Institutes are good enough. Students have access to computer labs for programming. Necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, library, canteen, sports, medical, etc., are available on the college campus. All these facilities are properly managed by the college management. Hostel facilities are also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The classes are good and the campus is clean and green. There is a big turf ground for students to practice various games. Various sports are conducted here and the development of the student is taken care of at each point. The mess is available, also various sports activities are conducted. The college rooms have a projector and various other gadgets to help the student understand better.

reviews.review_heading: It has well-equipped laboratories, a Wi-Fi campus, and a well-resourced library.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best library, high-tech labs, and classrooms. The hostel is average. A canteen and cafeteria are available, and there is a big football ground. Being part of ACEM made my life easy. Staff members and teachers helped me not only with my studies but also with my social life. I am looking for the best part of my life with ACEM.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the good colleges, but it can be better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. The hostel facility is average. Our college provides workshops, playgrounds, and well-managed classrooms. There is a library with many important books which will definitely help you to study.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a great institute for a great beginning of a successful career.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all the necessary facilities very efficiently. All the basic needs are taken care of in a good way and willing. Common needs such as Wi-Fi, air-conditioners, purified drinking water, sanitary facilities, etc., are possible to acquire very easily.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The industry lab is good and clean with working equipment. In the library, all reference books are available. The quality of facilities is available in the hostel like reading rooms. Good quality of food is available in mess and canteen. Many sports are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: It has good classrooms and green environment.
reviews.review_text: The college has centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors, tutorial rooms, and a library. The college is endowed with renovated hostels and medical support systems. The quality of hostel facilities is very good. Good mess facilities are provided to all students.

faqs.answer: A:    Tripura Medical College and Dr. B R A M Teaching Hospital is a well-known institution for MD, MS, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Tripura Medical College and Dr. B R A M Teaching Hospital has course specializations in General Medicine, Pathology, Pharmacology, ENT.
faqs.question: What all specializations are provided by the courses offered at Tripura Medical College and Dr. B R A M Teaching Hospital?

review_content.General: The package of placement is different according to the hospital in which students take a job, which ranges between 50-1.1 LPA. Top institutes are central government-sponsored medical colleges, which give a salary of 90-1.1 LPA after passing MBBS. 100% students need to complete 1-year mandatory internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good in this college with all the facilities in the lecture hall and the library books are available. There is a separate section for journals. Hostel facility is good, mess, canteen, medical facilities, and all are available here.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Tripura Medical College and Dr. B R A M Teaching Hospital.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of the 9th batch from 2014-2015 of MBBS in this college. A total of 150 students are getting admitted every year in MBBS course. Out of them, around 90% of the students of our batch have passed out successfully, and they have completed their internship by March 2020.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is a 4 storeyed building with all the latest facilities available for the best service to students. There are 9 lecture halls for each semester which are well-equipped with central air-conditioners and air coolers. There is a library with a huge collection of books ranging from textbooks to reference books, foreign and national journals. There are at least 30 computers in the library for the benefit of college staff members. The college is well-equipped with Wi-Fi throughout the college campus. There are separate hostels for UG boys and girls and separate hostels for PG students and resident doctors. Quality of food served in the mess of hostels is pretty good. There are cricket playground, football ground, basketball court and a gymnasium for refreshment.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Information about my college.

review_content.Placements: The internship is 100% guaranteed as our college has its own hospital. Students are posted there after the 4th year. After graduation, maximum of them give exams for post-graduation. The rest either work in nursing homes or hospitals. Students also sit for smile.

individual_reviews.title: Overall the college is good for studying MBBS and MD course also with good facility.

content.Placements: Doctor is a professional career with a high success rate. For entering this college, you should clear the NEET UG exam and go through counseling by merit list. It is a course of 4.5 years college with 1 year internship. All the passed-out students can do an internship after passing the final year successfully.
content.Infrastructure: The bedroom facility and food availability in the college hostel are good. There are also good facilities for playing cricket and other sports. The library supplies you with good knowledge by reading its books. Anyone can gain knowledge by reading them. Good classroom facilities are also available.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the faculty members but the hostel needs renovation and improvement.

content.Placements: Tripura Medical College and Dr BR Ambedkar Memorial Teaching Hospital, Hapania, Agartala, West Tripura is a reputed institution located 7km from the city center. Each MBBS batch contains 100 undergraduate students. All the faculty members are very experienced and highly qualified. The clinical subjects like Medicine, Surgery, and Obstetrics and Gynecology have very qualified professors who have done their PG from reputed government colleges from all over India like AIIMS Delhi, RIMS Imphal, SMS Medical College, Jaipur. This college has an annual fest called 'NEURON' which occurs in November every year. The students are brilliant and hardworking, who get top ranks in university exams every year. In NEET PG Exam, the students of this college get good ranks and get the chance to study in good medical colleges all over India. Last year a student got 134 ranks in this exam. There is a good teaching-learning environment in this college. This college is 17 years old.

Girls hostel is very good like there is geysers in all the bathroom rooms are also okayish but boys hostel is average 
Mess and canteen food okay 
Students get free treatment and check up whenever needed with time to time 
There are many sports and games facilities 
.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely best medical college.
reviews.review_text: Girls hostel is better than boys hostel, the room are super clean, and the college itself is very clean and beautiful with green surrounding and beautiful people around, mess food isn't bad either and there is grand fest once a month, where best food is serve.

reviews.review_heading: College with lots of memories
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are spacious and tidy with big screen to help us to study through pictures and slides ,library offers free books issued on basis of library card ,labs are also very good with good equipment for studying cells and practising different type of test.food is avreage and canteen is also fine ,college is within the hospital that provides wide range of facilities to us like free visit to physician to students .

reviews.review_heading: The average learning teaching process lacked effectiveness.
reviews.review_text: The classroom was well equipped with a projector and modern facilities. The library had plenty of books and PYQs for university exams. There was no Wi-Fi facility. Canteen and mess food was of below average quality. Hostels were not good enough for staying especially for boys. Hostels feel like a ghost house though the girls hostel was okay.

college_info.intro:
Some of the popular programmes offered at RIMT University include BTech and MTech. For BTech admissions, students must have passed Class 12 exam with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one among Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students) in all subjects taken together.
On the other hand, for MTech course, students must have a bachelor’s degree in Engineering or equivalent in the relevant field with at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of reserved category candidates). Students can check the RIMT University popular programmes in the table provided below:

placements.overview: At RIMT University, the dedicated takes charge of all placement-related matters for students across departments. Students can check the in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    The placement at the Regional Institute of Management and Technology University is generally better for MBA students compared to BTech students. As per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024, the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA, respectively. Hence, the placement package offered to MBA graduates is slightly higher than the BTech course. However, according to the reports, the number of BTech student
faqs.question: Which has better placement at RIMT University, BTech or MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    The RIMT university's placement cell is said to be cooperative and has a decent placement rate. Further, the university claimed that it has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Management NIRF reports 2024  the median package offered during RIMT University MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.57 LPA. However, to be very precise there is no such thing as a 100% placement guarantee, students can get placement opportunities from the university'
faqs.question: Does RIMT University provide 100% placements for MBA?

faqs.answer: A:    RIMT University has a placements cell that takes charge of all placement-related matters for students across Management departmentt. The cell aims to align recruiter expectations with the aspirations of MBA students, ensuring a mutually beneficial placement experience. Some of the top recruiters, mentioned at RIMT University's official website are: Bajaj Capital Bank of America Amazon Pay IBM Tata Consultancy Services HDFC Bank
faqs.question: Which companies recruits MBA graduates from RIMT University?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
RIMT University offers over 250 UG, PG, diploma and doctoral courses to the students across various fields such as Engineering, Science, Management, Agriculture, Design, Pharmacy, Health Science, Education, Arts and Humanities, Computer & IT and Commerce & Accounting, among others. For admission, candidates are required to meet with the minimum eligibility criteria set by the University.

Majority of the UG courses have a duration ranging between three to five years and for most of the PG courses, the duration is two years. Students can check the RIMT University courses along with the eligibility criteria and the total course fee in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:     College is charging genuine fees for all courses they provides. College fees for B.Tech is 1.11 Lacs (for 1 st year), B.Sc is 1.04 Lacs (for 1st year), MBA is 1.02 Lacs (1st year fees), Diploma -1.34 Lacs (1st year).Fees of this college is very normal for every course, you can choose this as a option according to fees.College placement is little bit lower, as only 60% of the students gets placement from this college.You can directly took admission in this college .Only for B.Tech, you need more than 60% in 12th boards
faqs.question: How costly is RIMT University?

faqs.answer: A:    Hello Nishar Ahmed, this private University established almost 25 years ago in 1998 at a place called Mandi Gobindgarh in Punjab,  is quite popular among students of Northern India. For seeking admission in MBA of 2 years in this university, the requirements are quite simple or normal. A student needs to obtain his degree with 50% aggregate marks and also 12th with 50% of aggregate marks. This university accepts ranking or scoring in any of the different management entrance exams conducted in India like MAT, XAT, CAT, CMAT or GMAT. You can get insights into the admission process for not only this course but there are plenty of other Management courses after graduation in this university, via link that I am attaching below:-https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/admissionBest wishes to you.
faqs.question: Which entrance exam is required for MBA at RIMT University?

faqs.answer: A:    No, you can easily took admission in this college. As this is a private college, there are lot of seats available .But for B.Tech you should have given JEE Mains with more than 45% in 12th boards exams.For B.Com, students need 50 % in commerce stream in 12th boards.For BCA, just any students who have completed thier 12th boards can took admissions.College accepts Cbse 12th as well as PSEB 12th .Contact to the college offline or else register your details on their website, you can easily get a seat in this college
faqs.question: Is RIMT University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. To complete the application, candidates need to visit the university's official admission portal, where candidates have to register with their personal email ID and mobile number.This fee is a crucial part of the application process and is required to finalise aspirants' submission.
faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.A at RIMT University?

reviews_list.review_title: A brief review of RIMT University.

review_content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed from our course. The highest package offered was about Rs. 80000 per month in our course. Recruiting companies are diagnostic centers. Around 100% of students secured internships in different hospitals in their areas.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure like best furniture, 24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.

review_content.Placements: Very few placements are provided by this university. This university offers less exposure, but it provides various industrial visits, which may help you get placed independently. There are many extracurricular activities that students should be involved in for overall development.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc in Operation Theatre and Anaesthesia Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: RIMT University is the best university in India.

review_content.Placements: There were at least 40% placements which happened on the campus earlier, so that was just a beautiful initiative that took place on the campus. So the highest packages were - 2 lakhs LPA, low packages were like 1 lakh. Roles given by the company were operation theatre technician as well as anesthesia management.
review_content.Infrastructure: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

faqs.answer: NTA released the re-revised scorecard on July 26, 2024. In this scorecard, the score has been revised as per the Supreme Court verdict of removing the bonus marks awarded earlier for the controversial Physics question, and deducting one mark from those who marked incorrect answer options. The city and centre-wise result data such as number of candidates appeared and scores obtained, by masking candidates' personal data was released on July 21, as per the Supreme Court order given on the hearing dated July 18, 2024. The NEET 2024 result for the re-exam, which was conducted on June 23, was declared on July 1, day day after the slated date. The final answer keys for the NEET 2024 re-exam was released by June 30, ahead of the result declaration. Earlier, the result of NEET 2024 was declared by NTA on June 4, 2024, 10 days ahead of the original schedule, which was June 14, 2024. NTA released the final NEET answer keys on June 4, prior to the release of the NEET result 2024. The NEET result was declared in an online mode. Candidates have to log in with their registration credentials or application number and date of birth, and download their scorecard in PDF format. NTA also released the merit list containing the name, Roll Number, All India Rank and Percentile of the candidates. Along with the NEET 2024 scorecard, NTA also released the NEET 2024 cutoff marks or the qualifying marks/scores.
faqs.question: Q: When did NTA release the NEET 2024 result?

overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by RIMT University?
overview_faqs.answer: The RIMT University is UGC-approved and is accredited by the AICTE, Bar Council of India, Pharmacy Council of India, and Council of Architecture for its wide range of courses.Fees for various courses offered as follow-ups:For B.Sc. it offers 43 courses with the total tuition fees 2.8 L- 4.7 L and for M.Sc. it offers 33 courses total tuition fees for this course ranges from 1.4 L- 3.5 L. 4 courses are in B.Pharm with the total tuition fees 3.5L-5L And for B.E/B.Tech the fees is 3.7L-6.4L.Total tuition for UG Diploma is 39k - 1.4L and for BA.LL.B it is 5.3L . For B.A . 15 courses is available with total tuition fees 1.4 L-3.1L and for BPT is 4.2L.10 courses are in BBA and tatal fees for this course is 2.9L-4.2L.You can see fee structure for more courses at https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/courses

review_summary.college_name: RIMT University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college and day by day, they are improving the quality of the college.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of students were placed in my course. The lowest package was 4.1 LPA and the highest was 7.1 LPA. Almost 90% of students got internships in my course. Supervisor and manager roles were provided to the students, and many students got posts in the same college after getting a good degree from the same college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and a library were available. Good hostels and good food were served there. Many activity areas were available. RO water was available. ACs and coolers were also available. A good internet connection was set up for us so we could study well. Every class projectors were placed.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: My best college in the world.

content.Placements: Above 50 students were placed in my course. The highest package was 12 LPA, and the lowest package was 4 LPA. All top companies like Intel, and so many local companies hired students. 50% of students got internships at Intel. Role offered was a corporate lawyer in a firm.
content.Infrastructure: College provided all necessary facilities to students like free Wi-Fi, computer and science labs, proper classrooms, and different libraries for every department. Hostel provided healthy food to the hostler. It also provided good rooms and washrooms for all.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Radiology and Imaging Technology (MRIT) - Batch of 2023

content.Placements: Around 10% of students were placed from our course. The highest package offered was about Rs. 80000 per month in our course. Recruiting companies are diagnostic centers. Around 100% of students secured internships in different hospitals in their areas.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure like best furniture, 24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the campus.

content.Infrastructure: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

paragraphs: RIMT University has 21 schools that offfer various UG, PG, diploma and PhD programmes in a wide range of specialisations like Management, Health Sciences, Engineering, Computer Science, etc. RIMT University admission 2025 is ongoing for all the courses. Candidates can visit the official webiste of the University and register for the selected course for further admission process. The University considers merit as well as entrance test scores for admission to different courses.
The table below mentions the eligibility and selection criteria for popular RIMT University courses:

A pass in Class 12 exam with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one among Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject with at least 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students) in all subjects taken together
A pass in Class 12 or its equivalent examination from any stream

Those candidates who have passed their Class 10 along with a three-year Diploma in any trade from Punjab State Board of Technical Education & Industrial Training, Chandigarh or such Examination from any other recognised State Board of Technical Education
Merit-basis

Merit-basis

A pass in BCom with at least 50% aggregate
A pass in any bachelor’s degree of minimum three-year duration from a recognised university
CAT/MAT/CMAT
A pass in Class 10 (or Class 12 for some specialisations) with 50% aggregate

faqs.question: When did NTA release the NEET 2024 result?
faqs.answer: NTA released the re-revised scorecard on July 26, 2024. In this scorecard, the score has been revised as per the Supreme Court verdict of removing the bonus marks awarded earlier for the controversial Physics question, and deducting one mark from those who marked incorrect answer options. The city and centre-wise result data such as number of candidates appeared and scores obtained, by masking candidates' personal data was released on July 21, as per the Supreme Court order given on the hearing dated July 18, 2024. The NEET 2024 result for the re-exam, which was conducted on June 23, was declared on July 1, day day after the slated date. The final answer keys for the NEET 2024 re-exam was released by June 30, ahead of the result declaration. Earlier, the result of NEET 2024 was declared by NTA on June 4, 2024, 10 days ahead of the original schedule, which was June 14, 2024. NTA released the final NEET answer keys on June 4, prior to the release of the NEET result 2024. The NEET result

A student needs to obtain his degree with 50% aggregate marks and also 12th with 50% of aggregate marks.
