placement_report.college_name: RIMT University Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: RIMT University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The overall highest package offered during RIMT University placements stood at INR 30 LPA . Further, RIMT University has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024 , the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to the NIRF report 2023, 46 BTech and 7 MBA students were placed during RIMT University placements 2022. Further, the median package offered to BTech and MBA students during 2022 placements was INR 2.2 LPA and INR 2.04 LPA, respectively. Earlier, the highest package offered during RIMT University placements 2021 stood at INR 43 LPA . Moreover, more than 600 companies visited the campus during RIMT University placements 2021.

The university has released the Engineering and Management NIRF report 2023 that incorporates 2022 placement statistics for respective courses. Click on the below link to download the RIMT University placement data 2022:

faqs.question: How is the BPharm placements at RIMT University?
faqs.answer: RIMT University BPharm placement data has not been declared by the University. However, according to the placement NIRF data for the year 2024, the RIMT University BPharm median package offered ranges from INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA . Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What are students opinion on BPharm placements at RIMT University?
faqs.answer: According to the verified Shiksha review , the BPharm students, and alumni of RIMT University describe the BPharm placements as good and well-maintained. Candidates can check some of the reviews below: Review 1: "Almost 100% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered is INR 67,600 per month. Almost 100% of students got internships from our course in many companies". Review 2: "Almost 90% of students are placed in our college. The highest salary offered is Rs.55,000 per month. The lowest salary offered is INR 20,000 per month. About 80% of students got internships. All types of courses and good offers are provided on the RIMT campus". Review 3: " B pharmacy is a professional course of four years it is a very good course I am having a great experience There are almost 80 students in my batch the highest package- is INR 3-4 LPA. The lowest package is INR 1.5-2 LPA The internship facilities are also very good many multinational companies came across our college for internships like Sun Pharmaceutical, etc.". Conclusively, students expressed their satisfaction towards the BPharm placements conducted by RIMT University. However, there may be some variation in placement outcomes depending on the year and batch of students.

faqs.question: Which has better placement at RIMT University, BTech or MBA?
faqs.answer: The placement at the Regional Institute of Management and Technology University is generally better for MBA students compared to BTech students. As per the Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024 , the median package offered during RIMT University BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 3.34 LPA and INR 4.57 LPA , respectively. Hence, the placement package offered to MBA graduates is slightly higher than the BTech course. However, according to the reports, the number of BTech students placed is more than the number of graduates placed from MBA courses.

faqs.question: Does RIMT University provide 100% placements for MBA?
faqs.answer: The RIMT university's placement cell is said to be cooperative and has a decent placement rate. Further, the university claimed that it has recorded 100% placements during the recent placement drive. Apart from this, as per the Management NIRF reports 2024 the median package offered during RIMT University MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4.57 LPA . However, to be very precise there is no such thing as a 100% placement guarantee, students can get placement opportunities from the university's side but, qualifying for the interview rounds, and skills & aptitude test are completely based on students, how they perform in that. Hence, the university is claiming that they offer 100% placements to their MBA students but, to get a job students must prepare themselves.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for B.A at RIMT University?
faqs.answer: The application fee for the BA programme at RIMT University is INR 580. This fee is non-refundable and must be paid during the online application process. To complete the application, candidates need to visit the university's official admission portal, where candidates have to register with their personal email ID and mobile number.This fee is a crucial part of the application process and is required to finalise aspirants' submission.

faqs.question: How costly is RIMT University?
faqs.answer: College is charging genuine fees for all courses they provides. College fees for B.Tech is 1.11 Lacs (for 1 st year), B.Sc is 1.04 Lacs (for 1st year), MBA is 1.02 Lacs (1st year fees), Diploma -1.34 Lacs (1st year). Fees of this college is very normal for every course, you can choose this as a option according to fees. College placement is little bit lower, as only 60% of the students gets placement from this college. You can directly took admission in this college .Only for B.Tech, you need more than 60% in 12th boards

faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses offered by RIMT University?
faqs.answer: The RIMT University is UGC-approved and is accredited by the AICTE, Bar Council of India, Pharmacy Council of India, and Council of Architecture for its wide range of courses. Fees for various courses offered as follow-ups: For B.Sc. it offers 43 courses with the total tuition fees 2.8 L- 4.7 L and for M.Sc. it offers 33 courses total tuition fees for this course ranges from 1.4 L- 3.5 L. 4 courses are in B.Pharm with the total tuition fees 3.5L-5L And for B.E/B.Tech the fees is 3.7L-6.4L. Total tuition for UG Diploma is 39k - 1.4L and for BA.LL.B it is 5.3L . For B.A . 15 courses is available with total tuition fees 1.4 L-3.1L and for BPT is 4.2L. 10 courses are in BBA and tatal fees for this course is 2.9L-4.2L. You can see fee structure for more courses at https://www.shiksha.com/university/rimt-university-punjab-other-25191/courses

hostel.description: Rimt provides on-campus accommodation. All rooms are fully furnished; include utilities, Wi-Fi internet connection and meals which are prepared in-house by a chef. The usual dining schedule from Monday to Saturday comprises full breakfast, lunch and dinner, paid laundry facilities are also available. Students get a study desk and chair, chest of drawers, wardrobe, washbasin, and more. There are also adapted rooms in the halls for students with disabilities. Students also have access to computer labs, fitness centres, and swimming pools.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and day by day, they are improving the quality of the college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, good classrooms, and a library were available. Good hostels and good food were served there. Many activity areas were available. RO water was available. ACs and coolers were also available. A good internet connection was set up for us so we could study well. Every class projectors were placed.

reviews.review_heading: My best college in the world.
reviews.review_text: College provided all necessary facilities to students like free Wi-Fi, computer and science labs, proper classrooms, and different libraries for every department. Hostel provided healthy food to the hostler. It also provided good rooms and washrooms for all.

reviews.review_heading: A brief review of RIMT University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure like best furniture,  24/7 power supply, projectors in classrooms, one best library for every department. In hostels, beds, table chairs, almirah, Wi-Fi, and cooler/air-conditioners in each were placed. Facilities in hostel mess were excellent like good quality food, a good lighting system, and also the canteen food was the best. There was a multi-specialty hospital for students as well as the local public. In sports, almost every games were played in different places inside the c...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by this institute. Well maintained infrastructure, well educated faculty.
reviews.review_text: There are many libraries in this institution. Knowledge is key to success, and interested students can easily get it through this university year-round. Wi-Fi is not provided. Classrooms are well-maintained with air conditioning and curtains. It is a good institute to socialize.

reviews.review_heading: RIMT University is the best university in India.
reviews.review_text: If I would talk about the infrastructure of the campus, that would be like we have a very unique experience there, like they had their own multi-specialty hospital on the campus as well. Emergency services were available, as well as the department was something which was way amazing.

reviews.review_heading: I have spent good quality time in this university, and I learned a lot from this university.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities in our hospital, proper labs, good internet connection, and classrooms are comfortable and in a noise-free area. A library is also available near the department. In the hostel, there are 2-seater and 3-seater rooms. AC and non-AC rooms are both available for students. The quality of food is good in our canteen, and the mess also provides hygienic food. 24-hour medical facility available, and all sports games are played in the university.

reviews.review_heading: It is a great college and value for money. Every student should consider taking admission here.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of my course are good. Wi-Fi is also available, labs are well organized, and classrooms are neat and clean. The library is well-maintained. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is good, and the food quality is tasty. Medical facilities are also good.

reviews.review_heading: The university is on GT Road and has a very good environment on campus.
reviews.review_text: They provide AC rooms with Wi-Fi. They provide us with books from the labs, and our department is very good and not far from the university's main gate. The department is near the university hospital and close to the entrance of the university.

reviews.review_heading: Really good campus life.
reviews.review_text: We were provided unlimited Wi-Fi, proper tables and chairs, and our own personal lockers in hostels. In our classrooms, there is AC and projectors, so visual learning is provided. Proper breakfast, lunch, snacks and dinner are given in the mess and in the canteen too.

reviews.review_heading: RIMT UNIVERSITY- Regional Institute of Management and Technology .
reviews.review_text:
infrastructure of Rimt university is good but according to me, it can be better if they painted all the departments There are many departments and hostels which are not fully made and painted 
Hostel facilities are not so good, but they can also be better.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure at Rimt and the design.
reviews.review_text: The hostel life in Rimt University is very good. The food quality is mid-range, and the menu of the mess is nearly updated every day. The canteen food is better, and medical as well as sports and other extracurricular activities are also available for the students residing in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment, excellent teaching, and best placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our course are good, like the library, which helps students with their respective subjects. And the classroom is well maintained, cleaned, and decorated. The quality of the hostel is average because in hostels there are hygiene problems that affect students health. And the food quality is average; they provide good food to the students, but some of the students complain that the food is bad for their health. So yes, this is the reason for giving an average rating to the hostel ...

reviews.review_heading: College is normal and the fees is high.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not good. It is average. The classes are not well developed. They are average like high schools. Hostels are very bad. Mess facility and washrooms are very bad. The rooms are not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a top-level university.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our classrooms are neat. Our labs are good and decent. The food served in the mess is good and hygienic. Our university has a hospital. Our college has many sports grounds.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for engineering students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best facilities in the hostel room for students. Wi-Fi facility is available at high speed in our hostel rooms. There is an RJ-45 connector installed for hostelers. The food served in the mess is good compared to other colleges.

review_summary.college_name: MJRPU Jaipur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has nice facilities and good infrastructure. It has 2 campuses and is good to take admission.

content.Placements: MJRP University has a peaceful environment and is useful for all types of courses. About 80% of students get placements after completing the degree. There is no fixed average package, and it depends on our percentage and practicals. The average salary is Rs. 40,000 per month, and can be easily earned by an average student in the physiotherapy course. Approximately, all students get internship who are doing a degree from college. It is a budget-friendly college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a study environment and daily classes. It has a nice campus and also a playground. The library has books for every course. A hostel facility is also available with good food. There are helpful colleagues who help us in our studies and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BBA + MBA - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our batch of integrated BBA+MBA students had a great journey despite having a small class size.

content.Placements: Our batch of integrated BBA and MBA students had a great academic journey. The strength of the students is very low. This year, ICICI has been recruiting for the internships. The top role that was offered to our batch is Relationship Manager, and the average package that was offered is 2.5 lacs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not up to par but they have recently renovated the digital room with the latest digital equipment for the management students. The hostel facilities are designed to offer a comfortable and conducive living environment for students.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (July 2025)- B.Sc. (Hons.) in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Realistic review of Mahatma jyotirao phoole university.

content.Placements: Yes, the college offers placements if you have a good percentage in your exams and have such qualities, so you will be selected and placed at top firms. I am currently in my first year; that's why I don't have the same amount of knowledge, but I have seen my seniors get placed in various top firms in India.
content.Infrastructure: The college has many labs, like the psychology lab, the physics lab, the chemistry lab, the botany lab, and the and the Zoology lab, and each and every course student has their own classroom. There is no Wi-Fi facility available. There is a very good, spacious library with every book that you need.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Law (LL.B.) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied because of no placements and Scholarships. The faculty and infrastructure are good.

content.Placements: There is no placement in the College for any department. And also, there is no scholarship program for the students. In the future, I would like to prepare for judicial exams. The minimum package for the Judiciary is 10 Lacs annually. I have also done some internships in the Session and High Court to gain more knowledge of law.
content.Infrastructure: It has a separate building, and there are many students in the department. The hostel facility is very good. I have been staying in the hostel for almost 2 years and I really enjoyed it. The Hostel is well maintained, and the rooms are very spacious. There are also other facilities like Libraries and Labs for the students. But there is no Canteen available for students.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college campus review.

content.Placements: They have no placements in this college. You only get knowledge of coding, web development and Java, but you cannot get a placement because there are no collaborations with the companies by the college. You get amazing marks in the college but you don't get placed here.
content.Infrastructure: As a student of this University, I am interested in Computer Science whose faculty teaches very clearly and gives us proper knowledge of the course which is very good. We have an unlimited Wi-Fi, 2 computer labs, a library and a hostel for girls.

courses_data.name: MJRPU Jaipur BTech Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University offers a bachelor's degree in science which lasts for four years. The BTech course is offered across multiple specialisations such asComputer Science/ Electrical/ Civil/Chemical/Electronics & Communication,etc. MJRPU also offers two BTech integrated programmes: BTech+MTech andBTech+MBAlasting for five years.  Admission is based on the BTech eligibility criteria as per the specialisations. Read on to know more aboutMJRPU BTech programme.

faqs.question: How to get into BTech at MJRPU Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University offers a merit based admission to its BTech programme. The BTech programme is offered at UG level lasting for four years. Candidates must qualify the BTech eligibility criteria as per the university's admission guidelines.BTech Eligibiltiy Criteria:Twelve years of school education with 45% aggregate in Physics, Maths & Chemistry, Biotech.Eligible candidates can directly apply at the MJRPU's official website. Candidates are first required to register on the web

faqs.question: How much does BTech at MJRPU Jaipur cost?
faqs.answer: The overall cost of BTech at MJRPU Jaipur is INR 2 Lacs - INR 4.3 lakh.The fees might include components other than tuition fees. Candidates also have to pay a registration fee of INR 2,500. You can pay the fee online through net banking, credit card, debit card, demand draft, NEFT, or RTGS. This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: What is the tuition fees for students getting lateral entry into BTech at Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University?
faqs.answer: Candidates who secure lateral entry into the 2nd year of BTech at Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University need to pay INR 40,500 per semester or INR 2.43 Lacs overall as their tuition fees. Details regarding admission fees for such candidates is currently unavailable. As a result, candidates who are able to secure lateral entry into BTech at Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University are advised to contact the officials to learn more about the fee for lateral entry into BTech courses at Mahatma Jyoti Rao P

faqs.question: What is the MJRPU BTech fees?
faqs.answer: TheMahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University BTech feesrange fromINR 2 Lacs to INR 4.3 lakh. The BTech course fees are inclusive of tuition fees, hostel charges, mess charges, lab fees, etc. Candidates must pay the course fee to finalise the BTech admission. Further, candidates must also pay the application fee for the BTech course.*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

courses_data.name: MJRPU Jaipur MBA Admissions 2025
courses_data.description: Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University offers postgraduate degree in management that lasts for two years. The MBA is offered across multiple scpecialisations such asHuman Resources,Finance, Marketing,Information Technology,Event Management,Fashion Managementetc. MJRPU Jaipur also offers one executive MBA porgramme and oneMBA+BBA integratedcourse. Admission is merit based. However, candidates must participate in the personal interview round conducted by the Department of Managment. Read on to know more aboutMJPRU Jaipur MBA programme.

faqs.question: Which courses are offered under MBA at MJRPU Jaipur?

placement_data.title: MJRPU Jaipur Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: MJRP University has a dedicated placement cell . The eminent recruiters that participated in recent years’ Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University placements included HDFC Bank, Asian Paints, Infogen Labs Inc., Wipro , and many others. The complete statistics for 2023 placements are yet to be released. Once released they will be updated on this page. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, around 80% of the batch is placed annually. The highest and lowest packages offered in recent MJRPU placements were INR 20 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: What is the average package for B.Tech students at Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University?
faqs.answer: Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University have seperate Placement cell for facilitas placement preparation for students.Some of the top recruiters of MJRP university is Bank of India, Asian Paints, Infogen Labs Inc, Wipro, and many others.If you see pevious alumini's report they maximum get into sales and business development oriented career. The average salary of a B.Tech student in Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University is around 3-5 LPA and the highest package go upto 7 to 8 per Lacs annum.Last year comapanies like wipro are provided high package offers to the students.Considering the records the average package of a B.Tech student in Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University were come around 3 LPA.

faqs.question: Does Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University refund fees?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University (MJRPU) refunds fees under certain circumstances. The refund is given based on the University Grants Commission (UGC) guidelines.According to the guidelines they will charge you some percentage of fees.The charge amount varies based on the time taken for withdrawal from the program. The 100% of refund id given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or more before the Starting of classes.The 90% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made less than 15 days before the starting of classes.The 80% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 15 days or less after the Starting of classes.The 50% of refund is given if the withdrawal is made 30 days or less, but more than 15 days after the commencement of classes.No refund if the withdrawal is made more than 30 days after the commencement of classes.

faqs.question: How much does B.Pharma at Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University cost?
faqs.answer: MAHATMA JYOTI Rao Phoole’s B.Pharma tuition fee varies according to the major and is between Rs 75,00 and Rs 3,00,00 per year. The average B.Pharma course fee is about Rs 1.89,000 per year. Candidates are admitted to the program on the basis of their 12th CBSE pass. Candidates have to fulfill the eligibility criteria, which includes minimum 50% combined score in Physics and Chemistry with Mathematics or Biology as compulsory subjects. For more information, please visit Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole official website or admission cell.

reviews.review_heading: It has nice facilities and good infrastructure. It has 2 campuses and is good to take admission.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a study environment and daily classes. It has a nice campus and also a playground. The library has books for every course. A hostel facility is also available with good food. There are helpful colleagues who help us in our studies and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Our batch of integrated BBA+MBA students had a great journey despite having a small class size.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not up to par but they have recently renovated the digital room with the latest digital equipment for the management students. The hostel facilities are designed to offer a comfortable and conducive living environment for students.

reviews.review_heading: Realistic review of Mahatma jyotirao phoole university.
reviews.review_text: The college has many labs, like the psychology lab, the physics lab, the chemistry lab, the botany lab, and the and the Zoology lab, and each and every course student has their own classroom. There is no Wi-Fi facility available. There is a very good, spacious library with every book that you need.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied because of no placements and Scholarships. The faculty and infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: It has a separate building, and there are many students in the department. The hostel facility is very good. I have been staying in the hostel for almost 2 years and I really enjoyed it. The Hostel is well maintained, and the rooms are very spacious. There are also other facilities like Libraries and Labs for the students. But there is no Canteen available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college campus review.
reviews.review_text: As a student of this University, I am interested in Computer Science whose faculty teaches very clearly and gives us proper knowledge of the course which is very good. We have an unlimited Wi-Fi, 2 computer labs, a library and a hostel for girls.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. The campus is fully connected to high-speed Wi-Fi. Classrooms and labs are excellent. The food served in the mess is good. They provide games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very nice infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities available in the course and hostel at the college. Wi-fi, lab, classroom, library—all the necessary facilities are available in the college. The quality of the facilities is decent. Mess and canteen food are acceptable. There are sports facilities, and the number of medical facilities is also high.

reviews.review_heading: The worst decision of my life is, joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, and labs are not available. Computers do not work properly. Toilets are not maintained properly. Dissatisfied with the college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides the best knowledge to students.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides internships in the final year. The average salary offered is Rs. 54,000 per month.

reviews.review_heading: The college is absolutely not good for law students.
reviews.review_text: The library is not updated for a very long time. Books are too old and not a sufficient collection of books are there. The classrooms are average. You should not expect smart classrooms here. Wi-Fi is not good. There is no canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best for physiotherapy.
reviews.review_text: There are many hostels in our college. There are separate hostels for girls and boys.  Wi-Fi is available for students to study. There are many cultural activities and events. There is a library for students to study there.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college. I suggest you take admission here to make your career.
reviews.review_text: It has excellent Wi-Fi speed, good labs, and well-seated classrooms. The library environment is very good, and it has knowledgeable books. The hostel quality is good. The food served is just like home food. There is also a huge canteen in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Jyoti Rao Phoole University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good, well-equipped with ventilation and Wi-Fi. The food is decent. The variety in food is good, and they give you three meals a day and tea two times a day. The hostel fee is affordable, even the hostel facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a bit above average college.
reviews.review_text: There is no boys hostel on the main city campus. There is no Wi-Fi in college. There is no ground on the main city campus. It has PGs around it, so you can live nearby with freedom.

reviews.review_heading: This university is good but not for every course.
reviews.review_text: This college has a small campus, but the way they have utilised that small space is good. Hostels still do not have a washroom on one floor, but it will be built in a couple of years. There is no canteen and no sports and games in this college. The food served in a hostel is very good.

reviews_list.review_title: You must join this college if you are from a middle class family.

review_content.Placements: 65% of students get placed in top teaching companies at our college. The top recruiting companies are Wipro, TCS, Infosys, etc. The highest package is INR 8 LPA. The average package is INR 5 LPA, and the lowest package is INR 2–3 LPA. Students have to apply off-campus for internships, but colleges provide all the necessary details about them. The top roles offered in college by recruiters are software engineer, full-stack developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and libraries are well furnished and equipped with wi-fi, projectors, desktops, etc. The medical facilities are good. Sports Week is organized every year. There are two canteens on campus. The food in canteens is good. Hostel facilities are not good. The hostel feels like a cage for students. The food is a total waste.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college in terms of facilities within the fee structure.

review_content.Placements: Many companies visited our college with their packages, terms and conditions, and minimum and medium wages. review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities and infrastructure were available in all departments. Wi-Fi was mostly available at the time of admission. Lab sessions are regularly scheduled. Students are provided with extra classes. The huge library had a lot of books related to our interests. All facilities and good-quality food were provided, especially at the time of admission. Our college had a canteen, medical facilities, and sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of Rameshwaram Institute of Technology and Management.

content.Placements: Placements are average. The average salary package offered by companies is approximately 3 LPA. Students who join here should not have high expectations regarding jobs. Students who are good in studies and interviews get high salary package jobs. Around 50-70% of students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms are well-modified and the furniture of classrooms is in good condition. Labs are well-equipped with glassware, chemicals, and instruments. They have a proper environment and drainage system to perform experiments. The library has a good amount of books related to our course. Our college also provides hostels for the accommodation of students. The food quality is average in the hostel and canteen.

admission_overview.college_name: Rameshwaram Institute of Technology and Management Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection

admission_process.title: Rameshwaram Institute of Technology and Management Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rameshwaram Institute of Technology and Management admissions 2025are open to all the courses. The institute offers various courses such as BTech, BCom, MPharma, MBA etc. at the UG and PG level. Apart from the UG and PG courses the institutions also offer polytechnic and diploma courses. The admissions process atRITMis a mix of accepted entrance exams and university-level entrance exams. However, for courses like BPharma, MPharma MTech etc, the institute accepts CUET PG scores and conducts university entrance exams for BEd course. The institute is affiliated withAKTU UP, BTE UP,Lucknow Universityand NCTE.

The application process at RITM is a mix of online and offline procedures. The institute also offers direct admission. Rameshwaram Institute of Technology and Management offers 11 full-time courses and BTech, MTech BPharm, MBA, Polytechnic and DPharm are the flagship courses. Read the following article to know more aboutRITM course admission2025.

RITM admissions to all the courses are based on national/university-level entrance exam scores excluding the BTC course. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements of the respective courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria forRITM course admission 2025:
The admission process at RIMT is a multi-step procedure. Students can check the detailed Rameshwaram Institute of Technology and Management admission process steps below:
STEP 1: RIMT Application Process 2025
Candidates can apply online on the official website of the institute. Aspirants who opt for the offline admission process, need to physically visit the institute to obtain the form.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

RIMT shortlists candidates based on the entrance examination + counselling as per respective courses. Alternatively, applicants can apply for admission at RITM through the Central Universities Common Entrance Test (CUCET) counselling process. Follow the guidelines provided for CUCET application and counselling.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, candidates need to confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is very good. The campus is fully digitalised and Wi-Fi enabled. Every classroom is fully digitalised and has a smart screen and projector. We also get software skills on the smart screen. The library is huge, and lots of books and research papers are available here, but only two books are provided to each student. Mess food quality is very bad, but hygiene is maintained. The food is very oily. There are no sports and games facilities available on campus. The canteen f...

reviews.review_heading: Over all a good college for students.
reviews.review_text:
The hostel is just a bit good. But in terms of food, it is not that great. It does not have Wi-Fi and a lab. No special features in the hostel are there. 
 A vegan hostel but not for non-vegetarian people because it is not spicy and yummy.

reviews.review_heading: An overview of my college RITM in my view.
reviews.review_text: Library has well stocked books available and we have also provided digital library with aktu named nalanda consortium. Campus has free Wi-Fi facilities to students. We have proper labs and well known lab experts are available. Mess food is average type some times it's oily so much. But menu has various dishes available. We have also medical facilities available in campus. Sports are played twice in week and also there is competition between students during sports week.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rameshwaram Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like free Wi-Fi on the entire campus, etc., are available, and Wi-Fi helps students to avail online materials. There is a library facility, and we can issue a maximum of 2 books at a time for 1 week. Labs are conducted properly by us, and teachers coordinate with us. Classrooms are properly designed as per convenience, and also digital facilities are available in classrooms. The hostel facility is very good here, and the food is prepared in a proper manner and takes care of hygiene. V...

reviews.review_heading: This college has good facilities and there is good placements for 2018.
reviews.review_text: The library is beautiful, students can read in this college. The classrooms are average. Our college provides games like volleyball and cricket. The canteen is good, and the quality of food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Rameshwaram Institute of Technology and Management.
reviews.review_text: Our institute is good. The hostel facility is good. The food served in a mess is good. The library is full of books of the latest edition. All books are available, and you can also purchase them. Our college provides an unlimited Wi-Fi facility.

individual_reviews.title: Very good in academics and ayurvedic treatment.

content.Placements: 40 percent of students placed in my course. The highest package should be 2 Lacs the lowest is 25000 and the average is 75000. 90% of students got internships. content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure, classroom, and library are very good. The food available in the canteen is good quality, nice medical facility and sports games like football, cricket and days. The hostel is very good with clean toilets and ventilated rooms, a nice gym, and a campus.

individual_reviews.title: The facilities provided by the college is quite average.

content.Placements: Our college doesn't give us placements but students themselves have to search for a job No package courses are offered to medical student. faqs.answer: A:    The Disaster Management salary expert might vary owing to a variety of factors, one of which is experience. admission_process.title: Symbiosis School for Online and Digital Learning Admission Process 2025

paragraphs:
Symbiosis School for Online and Digital Learning course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theSymbiosis School for Online and Digital Learningapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG and Certificate programmes in fields of Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Data Science, Nursing, Banking and Finance and Insurance, and more. To know about the eligibility of Symbiosis School for Online and Digital Learning courses, students can visit the website.

Symbiosis School for Online and Digital Learning fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Symbiosis School for Online and Digital Learning fees is online. reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied by faculty and placement.

review_content.Placements: Most of the get placement. All the students get internships. The course makes students professional doctors. After completing your graduation, you will practice as a dentist or you can also go for academics. You can open your own clinic as well as hospital and do your own consultancy.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms and library. Quality of food is excellent. All the sports are organised every year. Medical facilities are very good. Quality of food in the canteen as well as in the mess is very good. Hostels are well maintained and all the facilities are available. The campus is too big.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am not satisfied with this college because faculty members are not good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 100% of students are placed. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA and the average salary package offered is 3 LPA. There are no companies recruiting. Almost 100% of students got internships. There are no offers for internship students by this college. Students are very good at this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and labs are not available in our college. Classrooms are not good. The facilities in the hostel are not good. Food is not available in the hostel. Mess, canteen, and playgrounds are not available. There will be no games played on the grounds of this college. Water and other needed sources are not provided by the college management and the college does not provide any facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is worth for your education .

review_content.Placements: There is nothing like placements in dental college. But the college gives a fair amount of selection of students in the NEET PG exam for MS colleges, for passing out batch. It is also an MS college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything on the campus is average. The complete university complies with five colleges all together - dental college, MBA college, Pharmacy college, hotel management, and engineering college.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are very good. Their way of teaching helps a lot in both practicals and theoretically. They encourage us for public speaking by giving us presentations from time to time which helps in performing various conferences.

content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are very good. Their way of teaching helps a lot in both practicals and theoretically. They encourage us for public speaking by giving us presentations from time to time which helps in performing various conferences.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Pramukhswami Medical College.
reviews.review_text: The lecture halls are very good, big, and air-conditioned. Our laboratories and departments are very well-maintained. There are separate departments for all subjects. The hostel is good. There are four persons in one room. The hostel is 2 floored with around 100 rooms. The food is also very good. There is one activity center where we can do a gym. There are many indoor sports and outdoor sports grounds for cricket and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Proud to be alumni of this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very nice for study. Well-equipped laboratories and seminar rooms with audio visual aids are available. Libraries are stocked with all national and international journals in hard bound and online copies. Hostels are fully air conditioned. Mess food is yum and hygienic. Campus is green with gym and playgrounds. Practical labs are also well-equipped with all the latest instruments.

reviews.review_heading: One of the good colleges to do your MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The hostel was great, with all the amenities. There were two different hostels according to your budget and requirements. The hostel staff was great, and the food was great. There were no complaints. Water, cleaning, bathrooms, and everything else were great. It was also very close to the college.

reviews.review_heading: All facilities are very good, and practical learning is also very good here.
reviews.review_text: All classes are very good. All classes are having AC. The infrastructure is very good, with facilities for learning like computers, Wi-Fi, and projectors all things is present. The hostel is very good, and daily cleaning and mopping are done. The light facility is also there.

reviews.review_heading: I like this college and my field just because of the good atmosphere and staff members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it is a famous college in Gujarat. If you want to know about our college, then you will search, and I am sure you will get the best feedback. Our college provides a library, a good lecture hall and physical facilities. The hostel is too much good compare to other college hostels with a good dining hall. Our college provides good medical facilities. Our college provides sports and ground for games like football, volleyball and basketball.
